id:7271319c285f6d3079a243af6fa3fcc7.ai_summary: In Villa d’Agri di Marsicovetere, Simone Zanini finished second. Finn is 13 seconds down in the overall standings.

id:f2a86c9af35846cfdc446bb2d6167adc.title: Matteo Ballerini: "Dopo la morte di papà non riuscivo a parlare, un blocco lungo 10 anni. Oggi voglio onorarlo"
id:f2a86c9af35846cfdc446bb2d6167adc.summary: Il figlio del ct del ciclismo scomparso in un incidente di rally: "A scuola serviva la sua firma, non dissi nulla e fui sgridato. Il Covid mi ha costretto a stare a casa e condividere i ricordi"
id:f2a86c9af35846cfdc446bb2d6167adc.ai_title: Matteo Ballerini: "After my father's death, I couldn't speak, a block that lasted 10 years. Today I want to honor him"
id:f2a86c9af35846cfdc446bb2d6167adc.ai_summary: The son of the cycling coach who died in a rally accident said: "At school they needed his signature, I said nothing and was scolded. Covid forced me to stay home and share memories."

id:87ad0fef06da77bc267cccf8064b4862.summary: Tappa accorciata, niente Sestriere per motivi di sicurezza: domenica la conclusione a Saluzzo
id:87ad0fef06da77bc267cccf8064b4862.ai_title: Women's Giro: Demi Vollering wins on Colle delle Finestre, Anna van der Breggen still in pink
id:87ad0fef06da77bc267cccf8064b4862.ai_summary: The stage was shortened and Sestriere was removed for safety reasons. The race finishes in Saluzzo on Sunday.

id:5a8954320375eb16361f67c26e0de6ba.title: Ecco il terribile Colle delle Finestre: il Giro d’Italia Women scala il cielo e fa la storia
id:5a8954320375eb16361f67c26e0de6ba.summary: Sabato la tappa regina della corsa rosa femminile: per la prima volta si affronta la salita piemontese di 18,5 km, con 7,8 km di strada bianca al 9,3% medio. Dal 1997 a oggi, senza paura, le ragazze hanno scalato Stelvio, Mortirolo e Zoncolan, tutte le vette più iconiche del ciclismo
id:5a8954320375eb16361f67c26e0de6ba.ai_title: Giro d’Italia Women to tackle the Colle delle Finestre for the first time
id:5a8954320375eb16361f67c26e0de6ba.ai_summary: On Saturday, the women’s Giro d’Italia reaches its queen stage with a first-ever ascent of the 18.5 km Colle delle Finestre in Piemonte, including 7.8 km of gravel at an average gradient of 9.3%. Since 1997, riders have climbed iconic mountains such as the Stelvio, Mortirolo and Zoncolan.

id:043c62106b3f31c8418991d6154002c5.title: Giro Women, Gery vince la settima tappa. Longo Borghini guadagna 5" sulle favorite
id:043c62106b3f31c8418991d6154002c5.summary: La 20enne francese è la più rapida a Salice Terme. La maglia rosa Van der Breggen è caduta a 53 km dal traguardo, ma si è rialzata ed è rientrata in gruppo. Elisa Longo Borghini rosicchia dei secondi in classifica
id:043c62106b3f31c8418991d6154002c5.ai_title: Giro Women: Gery wins stage seven as Longo Borghini gains time
id:043c62106b3f31c8418991d6154002c5.ai_summary: The 20-year-old French rider was fastest in Salice Terme. Maglia rosa Van der Breggen crashed 53 km from the finish but got back on her bike and rejoined the peloton. Elisa Longo Borghini took a few seconds back in the general classification.

id:3ecec46b6ad938180c0988589d286d89.title: Lidl-Trek, Guercilena lascia dopo il Tour: l’Italia perde anche l’ultimo team manager
id:3ecec46b6ad938180c0988589d286d89.summary: La squadra tedesca rivoluziona il management: ci saranno Andy Schleck e Niermann

id:3ecec46b6ad938180c0988589d286d89.ai_summary: The German team is reshaping its management, with Andy Schleck and Niermann set to join.

id:92021bc557dca8b880a2766500ccfdb3.title: Giornata internazionale della bici: mercoledì la Federciclo al Parlamento Europeo
id:92021bc557dca8b880a2766500ccfdb3.summary: Confronto istituzionale a Bruxelles su mobilità, sicurezza e innovazione normativa promosso dalla Fci. Ci saranno Ivan Gotti, re di due Giri d’Italia, e la campionessa paralimpica Claudia Cretti
id:92021bc557dca8b880a2766500ccfdb3.ai_title: International Bike Day: Federciclo to meet the European Parliament on Wednesday
id:92021bc557dca8b880a2766500ccfdb3.ai_summary: The Fci is promoting an institutional meeting in Brussels on mobility, safety and regulatory innovation. Ivan Gotti, winner of two Giro d’Italia titles, and paralympic champion Claudia Cretti will attend.

id:8c2ca20dd5634f6531bb04b9850efe7d.title: Da Anquetil a Vingegaard: Giro-Tour-Vuelta, la Tripla Corona è affare da fenomeni
id:8c2ca20dd5634f6531bb04b9850efe7d.summary: Oltre al francese nel 1963 e al danese oggi, soltanto altri sei campionissimi sono riusciti a vincere almeno una volta la corsa rosa, la Grande Boucle e la Vuelta. Due sono italiani: Nibali e Gimondi
id:8c2ca20dd5634f6531bb04b9850efe7d.ai_title: From Anquetil to Vingegaard: Giro-Tour-Vuelta remains a feat for champions
id:8c2ca20dd5634f6531bb04b9850efe7d.ai_summary: Along with the French rider in 1963 and the Dane today, only six other great champions have won the Giro d'Italia, the Tour de France and the Vuelta a Espana at least once. Two are Italian: Nibali and Gimondi.

id:01a500d27a0b43310f005a8a52c3ca18.title: Gall, il primo degli umani: "Arrivare secondo dietro Vingegaard non è una vergogna"
id:01a500d27a0b43310f005a8a52c3ca18.summary: L'austriaco, uno scalatore puro, secondo anche nelle tappe di Blockhaus, Corno alle Scale, Pila, Carì e Piancavallo, oggi sarà sul podio a Roma accanto al danese che ha dominato la corsa rosa: "È bello essere 'il migliore degli altri', per così dire"
id:01a500d27a0b43310f005a8a52c3ca18.ai_title: Gall, the first of the humans: 'Finishing second behind Vingegaard is no shame'
id:01a500d27a0b43310f005a8a52c3ca18.ai_summary: The Austrian climber, who was also second on the stages to Blockhaus, Corno alle Scale, Pila, Carì and Piancavallo, will be on the podium in Rome today alongside the Dane, who dominated the Corsa Rosa: 'It's nice to be, so to speak, the best of the rest.'

id:1265a5891345e7906fff52ca7e0de7fb.title: Favoriti Tour de France 2026, le quote dei bookmakers: Pogačar parte nettamente davanti a Vingegaard, Seixas stacca Del Toro ed Evenepoel per il podio
id:1265a5891345e7906fff52ca7e0de7fb.summary: Come nelle ultime edizioni, il Tour de France 2026 ha un favorito decisamente ingombrante, ma le alternative di qualità sicuramente non mancano. Questo, almeno, secondo i vari bookmakers che stanno predisponendo le quote per la vittoria finale della Grande Boucle numero 113 della storia, che inizierà sabato 4 luglio sulle strade di Barcellona per concludersi poi domenica 26 luglio su quelle di Parigi. Parlando dei potenziali “indossatori” dell’ultima Maglia Gialla in palio, il campo pare decisamente ristretto a due nomi, ovvero quelli che hanno vinto le ultime 6 edizioni del Grande Giro francese. In chiave podio c’è invece un grande …

id:ff29ea245d0b53a1e39246d3b9233a89.title: Coppa Italia delle Regioni 2026, Tommaso Dati scavalca Giulio Pellizzarri e si prende la vetta dopo i Campionati Italiani
id:ff29ea245d0b53a1e39246d3b9233a89.summary: È Tommaso Dati il nuovo leader della Coppa Italia delle Regioni 2026. Con il secondo posto nella prova in linea dei Campionati Italiani, il portacolori del Team UKYO balza al comando della Classifica Individuale con 180 punti, superando Giulio Pellizzari (Red Bull – Bora – hansgrohe) fermo a quota 164. id:e32803f7cff7b51a2409f7ee86e3919b.title: Ces Français qu'on attend sur le Tour de France (2/6) - Lenny Martinez, chasseur d'étapes et de maillot à pois : « Je ne sais pas comment va réagir mon corps si je joue le général »
id:e32803f7cff7b51a2409f7ee86e3919b.summary: Performant et régulier depuis le début de l'année, Lenny Martinez (Bahrain Victorious), qui a vécu deux Tours de France compliqués en 2024 et 2025, aura carte blanche pour aller chercher une étape ou le maillot à pois.
id:e32803f7cff7b51a2409f7ee86e3919b.ai_title: Lenny Martinez targets a Tour de France stage win or polka-dot jersey
id:e32803f7cff7b51a2409f7ee86e3919b.ai_summary: After a strong and consistent start to the season, Lenny Martinez of Bahrain Victorious will have freedom at the Tour de France to chase a stage victory or the mountains classification after two difficult editions in 2024 and 2025.

id:cb8a5e8085af46b9c66934d6a18027ea.title: Ces Français qu'on attend sur le Tour de France : Dorian Godon, le champion du peuple
id:cb8a5e8085af46b9c66934d6a18027ea.summary: Pas du tout prédestiné à faire carrière, le Lyonnais Dorian Godon, qui va disputer son troisième Tour de France, a mis du temps à révéler son potentiel. Personnage original au sein du peloton, il est désormais parmi les meilleurs sur les sprints en petit comité.
id:cb8a5e8085af46b9c66934d6a18027ea.ai_title: French riders to watch at the Tour de France: Dorian Godon
id:cb8a5e8085af46b9c66934d6a18027ea.ai_summary: Dorian Godon, set to ride his third Tour de France, took time to reveal his potential and has become one of the best riders in small-group sprints.

id:b1c6c61a7c56dc3a23badc81979cf32c.title: « Le général et au moins une victoire d'étape » : avec Seixas et Kooij,  Decathlon CMA-CGM annonce la couleur avant le Tour de France
id:b1c6c61a7c56dc3a23badc81979cf32c.summary: Decathlon CMA-CGM a livré sa sélection pour le Tour de France, expliquant jouer le classement général avec Paul Seixas, tout en visant au moins une victoire d'étape grâce à son sprinteur Olav Kooij, finalement retenu.
id:b1c6c61a7c56dc3a23badc81979cf32c.ai_title: Decathlon CMA-CGM targets general classification with Paul Seixas and stage wins with Olav Kooij at Tour de France
id:b1c6c61a7c56dc3a23badc81979cf32c.ai_summary: Decathlon CMA-CGM has announced its squad for the Tour de France, saying it will target the general classification with Paul Seixas while also aiming for at least one stage win with sprinter Olav Kooij, who has been selected.

id:1f51b35f7d8e9977e530c2a69ecfe653.title: Podcast  : Christian Prudhomme, vingt ans de frissons et de larmes à la tête du Tour de France
id:1f51b35f7d8e9977e530c2a69ecfe653.summary: Le 4 juillet, à Barcelone, Christian Prudhomme va débuter sa vingtième Grande Boucle en tant que patron du Tour de France. Vingt ans de souvenirs, d'émotions et d'anecdotes à la pelle qu'il raconte dans un podcast L'Équipe explore.
id:1f51b35f7d8e9977e530c2a69ecfe653.ai_title: Christian Prudhomme reflects on 20 years as Tour de France director
id:1f51b35f7d8e9977e530c2a69ecfe653.ai_summary: Christian Prudhomme will begin his 20th Tour de France as race director on 5 July in Barcelona, and looks back on two decades of memories, emotions and anecdotes in a L'Équipe explore podcast.

id:c59f3bd1ac089256005ea54f2c2fab37.title: Un documentaire en immersion avec Paul Seixas le 1er juillet sur le site de L'Équipe
id:c59f3bd1ac089256005ea54f2c2fab37.ai_title: Immersive documentary with Paul Seixas to be released on L'Équipe on July 1

id:716abbe11e21692b374763a893927c28.title: Jordan Jegat annonce la couleur pour le Tour de France 2026 : « Maillot jaune ou à pois, j'ai plein d'envies »
id:716abbe11e21692b374763a893927c28.summary: Remis d'un hiver pénible, Jordan Jegat, dixième du Tour de France 2025, a signé un tonitruant retour à la compétition au printemps. Le coureur de TotalEnergies se projette désormais sur juillet, en espérant au moins enlever une étape. Et beaucoup plus si affinités.
id:716abbe11e21692b374763a893927c28.ai_title: Jordan Jegat sets out his ambitions for the 2026 Tour de France: "Yellow jersey or polka dots, I have plenty of ambitions"
id:716abbe11e21692b374763a893927c28.ai_summary: Recovered from a difficult winter, Jordan Jegat, tenth in the 2025 Tour de France, made a strong return to racing in the spring. The TotalEnergies rider is now looking ahead to July, hoping to win at least one stage. And much more if possible.

id:5125e7db097f8bc894840ccd0cb4fde4.title: « Je m'autorisais seulement la victoire » : Romain Grégoire, sacré champion de France, la fin d'une quête lancée dès ses débuts chez les pros
id:5125e7db097f8bc894840ccd0cb4fde4.summary: Romain Grégoire est devenu, dimanche à La Tour-du-Pin, champion de France. La concrétisation d'un rêve, à 23 ans, qui l'anime depuis ses débuts chez les pros.
id:5125e7db097f8bc894840ccd0cb4fde4.ai_title: Romain Grégoire crowned French champion after long quest for victory
id:5125e7db097f8bc894840ccd0cb4fde4.ai_summary: Romain Grégoire became French champion on Sunday in La Tour-du-Pin, fulfilling a dream he has had since his early days as a professional.

id:54bdcd0b88efb13b5e439915a3b7521a.title: «Il y avait des frissons dans le bus et quelques larmes» : Groupama-FDJ United retrouve des couleurs grâce au sacre de Romain Grégoire, mis sur orbite par sa formation
id:54bdcd0b88efb13b5e439915a3b7521a.summary: La formation Groupama-FDJ United a été à la manoeuvre pour mettre son champion, Romain Grégoire, sur orbite, dimanche lors des Championnats de France. Une récompense au coeur d'une saison un peu difficile.
id:54bdcd0b88efb13b5e439915a3b7521a.ai_title: Groupama-FDJ United celebrates Romain Grégoire’s French title
id:54bdcd0b88efb13b5e439915a3b7521a.ai_summary: Groupama-FDJ United played a key role in setting up Romain Grégoire’s victory on Sunday at the French Championships, a reward after a difficult season.

id:5f7c8e89c3e5f7a0d9f47a70ed3517ae.title: Rune Herregodts devient champion de Belgique au terme d'un scénario improbable
id:5f7c8e89c3e5f7a0d9f47a70ed3517ae.summary: Promise à un sprinteur, la course en ligne du Championnat de Belgique a finalement souri à un baroudeur, Rune Herregodts (UAE), qui s'est imposé au bout d'un scénario inattendu où tous les favoris ont été piégés.
id:5f7c8e89c3e5f7a0d9f47a70ed3517ae.ai_title: Rune Herregodts becomes Belgian champion after unlikely race
id:5f7c8e89c3e5f7a0d9f47a70ed3517ae.ai_summary: Expected to suit a sprinter, the Belgian road race instead went to a breakaway rider, Rune Herregodts (UAE), who won after an unexpected race in which all the favourites were caught out.

id:c9fc268d481b2c3b34a4557a2d4355b1.title: Chaleur dantesque et calendrier à revoir : quelles pourraient être les conséquences après les France 2026 ?
id:c9fc268d481b2c3b34a4557a2d4355b1.summary: Romain Grégoire (Groupama-FDJ United) a remporté ce dimanche à La Tour-du-Pin la course en ligne de Championnats de France marqués par de très fortes chaleurs. De quoi engendrer des grandes questions, avec notamment un changement de calendrier et une plus forte adaptabilité.
id:c9fc268d481b2c3b34a4557a2d4355b1.ai_title: Extreme heat and a calendar rethink: what could the consequences be after France 2026?
id:c9fc268d481b2c3b34a4557a2d4355b1.ai_summary: Romain Grégoire (Groupama-FDJ United) won Sunday’s road race at the French Championships in La Tour-du-Pin, held in very high temperatures. That raises major questions, including a possible calendar change and greater adaptability.

id:a418d76a5c041d1401dd785d459a7d32.title: Romain Grégoire, sacré champion de France sur le circuit de la Tour du Pin : «Si je pouvais découper le maillot en 33, je le ferais»
id:a418d76a5c041d1401dd785d459a7d32.summary: Sacré champion de France à La Tour-du-Pin, Romain Grégoire (Groupama-FDJ United) a rendu hommage à ses 32 coéquipiers, qui ont tous oeuvré ce dimanche pour le faire gagner.
id:a418d76a5c041d1401dd785d459a7d32.ai_title: Romain Grégoire crowned French champion in La Tour-du-Pin: “If I could cut the jersey into 33 pieces, I would”
id:a418d76a5c041d1401dd785d459a7d32.ai_summary: After winning the French title in La Tour-du-Pin, Romain Grégoire (Groupama-FDJ United) paid tribute to his 32 teammates, all of whom worked on Sunday to help him win.

id:4ddbd46a701fa0bd6be871149d088fc1.title: Keldermann, Milan, la surprise en Espagne... Qui sont les nouveaux champions nationaux de cyclisme sur route ?
id:4ddbd46a701fa0bd6be871149d088fc1.summary: Comme Romain Grégoire qui a pu atteindre son rêve en France, la plupart des champions nationaux ont été sacrés ce week-end, dans les autres pays. Voici la liste, du vétéran Wilco Keldermann aux Pays-Bas à la surprise Rune Herregodts en Belgique.
id:4ddbd46a701fa0bd6be871149d088fc1.ai_title: Keldermann, Milan, the surprise in Spain: who are the new national road champions?
id:4ddbd46a701fa0bd6be871149d088fc1.ai_summary: Like Romain Grégoire, who achieved his dream in France, most national champions were crowned this weekend in other countries. Here is the list, from veteran Wilco Keldermann in the Netherlands to surprise winner Rune Herregodts in Belgium.

id:10d1e4ee1679d83ff02f693c45827ee6.title: Romain Grégoire réalise son rêve en devenant champion de France sur le circuit punchy de la Tour du Pin
id:10d1e4ee1679d83ff02f693c45827ee6.summary: Parti seul dans la dernière ascension à 3,2 km de l'arrivée à la Tour du Pin (Isère), Romain Grégoire (Groupama-FDJ United) est devenu champion de France à 23 ans, ce dimanche.
id:10d1e4ee1679d83ff02f693c45827ee6.ai_title: Romain Grégoire realizes his dream by becoming French champion on the punchy Tour du Pin circuit
id:10d1e4ee1679d83ff02f693c45827ee6.ai_summary: After going clear on the final climb 3.2 km from the finish in Tour du Pin (Isère), Romain Grégoire (Groupama-FDJ United) became French champion at 23 on Sunday.

id:b58d95f6173f62ff3d42a216e19cfbe9.title: Seul concurrent en lice, Victor Langellotti sacré champion de Monaco du contre-la-montre et de la course en ligne
id:b58d95f6173f62ff3d42a216e19cfbe9.summary: Victor Langellotti (31 ans) est devenu, ce week-end, double champion de Monaco de cyclisme sur route. Afin d'y parvenir, il lui a suffi de finir le contre-la-montre et la course en ligne du Championnat... d'Espagne.
id:b58d95f6173f62ff3d42a216e19cfbe9.ai_title: Victor Langellotti crowned Monaco champion in time trial and road race
id:b58d95f6173f62ff3d42a216e19cfbe9.ai_summary: Victor Langellotti, 31, became Monaco's double road cycling champion this weekend after finishing the time trial and road race at the Championship of Spain.

id:e28583980f77d4b7f52a9259064cf1fa.title: Wilco Kelderman devient champion des Pays-Bas, sa première victoire depuis onze ans
id:e28583980f77d4b7f52a9259064cf1fa.summary: À 35 ans, Wilco Kelderman est devenu ce dimanche champion des Pays-Bas sur route, sa première victoire depuis onze ans et la première de sa carrière sur une course en ligne.
id:e28583980f77d4b7f52a9259064cf1fa.ai_title: Wilco Kelderman becomes Dutch champion, his first win in 11 years
id:e28583980f77d4b7f52a9259064cf1fa.ai_summary: At 35, Wilco Kelderman became Dutch road race champion on Sunday, his first victory in 11 years and the first one-day win of his career.

id:c2e2230d311680dc26ac74d74091f5fa.title: Départ décalé et un tour en moins en raison de la canicule sur les Championnats de France
id:c2e2230d311680dc26ac74d74091f5fa.summary: En raison des fortes chaleurs, la course en ligne masculine des Championnats de France est raccourcie d'un tour de circuit à la Tour-du-Pin, ce dimanche. Le départ est également décalé à 11 h 35.
id:c2e2230d311680dc26ac74d74091f5fa.ai_title: Start delayed and one lap shorter because of the heat at the French Championships
id:c2e2230d311680dc26ac74d74091f5fa.ai_summary: Because of the high temperatures, the men's road race at the French Championships will be shortened by one circuit lap in Tour-du-Pin this Sunday. The start has also been moved to 11:35 a.m.

id:40f23982e3711d15fd61ec8723c289a3.title: Romain Grégoire, Benoît Cosnefroy, Paul Lapeira ou Axel Laurance... : nos favoris pour la course en ligne des Championnats de France
id:40f23982e3711d15fd61ec8723c289a3.summary: Sur un circuit taillé pour ses qualités de puncheur et dans la perspective d'un maillot bleu-blanc-rouge qui le fait rêver, Romain Grégoire (Groupama-FDJ) est le grand favori de la course en ligne des Championnats de France dimanche à La Tour-du-Pin en Isère.
id:40f23982e3711d15fd61ec8723c289a3.ai_title: Romain Grégoire, Benoît Cosnefroy, Paul Lapeira or Axel Laurance: our favorites for the French Championships road race
id:40f23982e3711d15fd61ec8723c289a3.ai_summary: On a circuit suited to his punchy qualities and with a blue-white-red jersey he dreams of, Romain Grégoire (Groupama-FDJ) is the big favorite for Sunday's French Championships road race in La Tour-du-Pin, Isère.

id:059d4540ef1744dfa13d60074bc40224.title: Seixas, Alaphilippe, Vauquelin, Martinez... De nombreux absents de marque pour la course en ligne des Championnats de France
id:059d4540ef1744dfa13d60074bc40224.summary: La course en ligne élite hommes des Championnats de France sera privée d'un bon nombre de cadors, ce dimanche à la Tour-du-Pin (Isère).
id:059d4540ef1744dfa13d60074bc40224.ai_title: Seixas, Alaphilippe, Vauquelin, Martinez among the notable absentees for the French Championships road race
id:059d4540ef1744dfa13d60074bc40224.ai_summary: The elite men's road race at the French Championships will be missing a number of top riders this Sunday in La Tour-du-Pin, Isère.

id:d6b0336c577d4aed774df3e0dc2b0cd1.title: La nouvelle championne de France Célia Géry, le phénomène « qui fait l'unanimité » chez FDJ United-Suez
id:d6b0336c577d4aed774df3e0dc2b0cd1.summary: L'explosive Célia Géry, sacrée championne de France à 20 ans ce samedi en Isère, s'est déjà imposée, à sa manière, comme l'une des cadres chez FDJ United-Suez.
id:d6b0336c577d4aed774df3e0dc2b0cd1.ai_title: New French champion Célia Géry impresses at FDJ United-Suez
id:d6b0336c577d4aed774df3e0dc2b0cd1.ai_summary: Célia Géry, crowned French champion at 20 on Saturday in Isère, has already established herself as one of the key riders at FDJ United-Suez.

id:dd6254954af89d244d6f1b4c5c1c0cc3.title: Sans Paul Seixas et avec seulement huit coureurs, Decathlon-CMA CGM va devoir s'adapter : « On est condamnés à courir juste »
id:dd6254954af89d244d6f1b4c5c1c0cc3.summary: Decathlon-CMA CGM, qui a décroché les deux derniers titres nationaux avec Paul Lapeira et Dorian Godon, se présente dimanche au départ des Championnats de France en version réduite. Mais pas sans ambitions.
id:dd6254954af89d244d6f1b4c5c1c0cc3.ai_title: Without Paul Seixas and with only eight riders, Decathlon-CMA CGM must adapt: “We are condemned to race smart”
id:dd6254954af89d244d6f1b4c5c1c0cc3.ai_summary: Decathlon-CMA CGM, which won the last two national titles with Paul Lapeira and Dorian Godon, lines up for Sunday’s French Championships with a reduced squad. But it still has ambitions.

id:9cd3ba26353894efb9d723ca2f653009.title: Favori de la course en ligne des Championnats de France, Romain Grégoire en quête de la pièce ultime dans sa collection de maillots tricolores : « Il n'a vraiment qu'une idée en tête »
id:9cd3ba26353894efb9d723ca2f653009.summary: Deuxième l'an passé aux Herbiers, Romain Grégoire, 23 ans, s'avance comme le principal favori au maillot de champion de France sur la course en ligne dimanche. Un « grand objectif de carrière » depuis ses premiers titres en juniors.
id:9cd3ba26353894efb9d723ca2f653009.ai_title: Romain Grégoire leads the French road race favourites in pursuit of the tricolour jersey
id:9cd3ba26353894efb9d723ca2f653009.ai_summary: Runner-up last year in Les Herbiers, Romain Grégoire, 23, goes into Sunday’s road race as the main favourite for the French champion’s jersey. He has called it a major career goal since his junior titles.

id:27d41ad5c08eb867e613d9c67381f17b.title: Célia Géry, sacrée championne de France ce samedi : « Je n'avais pas envie de me louper »
id:27d41ad5c08eb867e613d9c67381f17b.summary: Sacrée championne de France à La Tour-du-Pin ce samedi, Célia Géry, 20 ans, a confié son soulagement d'avoir pu concrétiser « l'énorme travail » réalisé par ses coéquipières de FDJ United-Suez.
id:27d41ad5c08eb867e613d9c67381f17b.ai_title: Célia Géry crowned French champion on Saturday: 'I didn't want to mess it up'
id:27d41ad5c08eb867e613d9c67381f17b.ai_summary: Crowned French champion in La Tour-du-Pin on Saturday, Célia Géry, 20, said she was relieved to have turned the huge work done by her FDJ United-Suez teammates into victory.

id:3f6091c844615966746d089aad8ebf53.title: Victime d'un malaise, un cycliste de 55 ans meurt lors de la cyclosportive La Tricolore Défi des Vals
id:3f6091c844615966746d089aad8ebf53.summary: Un cycliste de 55 ans est mort ce samedi après un malaise sur la cyclosportive La Tricolore Défi des Vals, organisée à La Tour-du-Pin (Isère), lieu des Championnats de France de cyclisme.
id:3f6091c844615966746d089aad8ebf53.ai_title: Cyclist dies after medical emergency during La Tricolore Défi des Vals cyclosportive
id:3f6091c844615966746d089aad8ebf53.ai_summary: A 55-year-old cyclist died on Saturday after suffering a medical emergency during the La Tricolore Défi des Vals cyclosportive, held in La Tour-du-Pin (Isère), the site of the French Cycling Championships.

id:078107d814b073b9f4566e49faf86988.title: Jonathan Milan sacré champion d'Italie pour la première fois à 25 ans
id:078107d814b073b9f4566e49faf86988.summary: Jonathan Milan s'est imposé dans un sprint massif lors de la course en ligne du Championnat d'Italie, ce samedi dans le Piémont. Le pensionnaire de Lidl-Trek glane son titre national pour la première fois de sa carrière.
id:078107d814b073b9f4566e49faf86988.ai_title: Jonathan Milan crowned Italian champion for the first time at 25
id:078107d814b073b9f4566e49faf86988.ai_summary: Jonathan Milan won a bunch sprint in the Italian road race championship on Saturday in Piedmont. The Lidl-Trek rider claimed his first national title.

id:b7952f3abaf5001d35bc943e7cbef647.title: Célia Géry championne de France à 20 ans au bout d'une journée bien orchestrée par son équipe FDJ United-Suez
id:b7952f3abaf5001d35bc943e7cbef647.summary: Déjà championne de France de cyclo-cross, Célia Géry a conquis le titre sur route à seulement 20 ans, ce samedi à la Tour-du-Pin, en maîtrise totale avec son équipe FDJ United-Suez.
id:b7952f3abaf5001d35bc943e7cbef647.ai_title: Célia Géry wins French road title at 20 with FDJ United-Suez support
id:b7952f3abaf5001d35bc943e7cbef647.ai_summary: Already a French cyclo-cross champion, Célia Géry won the road title at just 20 years old on Saturday in La Tour-du-Pin, riding with complete control alongside her FDJ United-Suez team.

id:845d3ea5ab5afe2c8015d61bb8f16a80.title: Decathlon CMA-CGM : Gregor Muhlberger annonce ne pas être au départ du Tour de France, une porte ouverte pour Olav Kooij ?
id:845d3ea5ab5afe2c8015d61bb8f16a80.summary: Le grimpeur Gregor Mühlberger a annoncé ce samedi qu'il ne participerait pas au Tour de France en juillet. Cela pourrait profiter au sprinteur néerlandais Olav Kooij pour intégrer la sélection de Decathlon CMA-CGM.
id:845d3ea5ab5afe2c8015d61bb8f16a80.ai_title: Decathlon CMA-CGM: Gregor Muhlberger says he will not start the Tour de France, opening the door for Olav Kooij?
id:845d3ea5ab5afe2c8015d61bb8f16a80.ai_summary: Climber Gregor Mühlberger announced on Saturday that he will not ride the Tour de France in July. That could open the door for Dutch sprinter Olav Kooij to make Decathlon CMA-CGM's lineup.

id:6c2f633198202c2399761f70ec34919b.title: Octuple vainqueur d'étape en Grand Tour, Magnus Cort Nielsen prendra sa retraite à l'issue de la saison : « On finit par avoir envie d'arrêter »
id:6c2f633198202c2399761f70ec34919b.summary: L'équipe Uno-X Mobility a annoncé que son coureur Magnus Cort Nielsen allait mettre un terme à sa carrière à l'issue de la saison. Le Danois de 33 ans, double vainqueur d'étape sur le Tour de France, espère briller une dernière fois sur la Grande Boucle en juillet.
id:6c2f633198202c2399761f70ec34919b.ai_title: Eight-time Grand Tour stage winner Magnus Cort Nielsen to retire at the end of the season: "You eventually feel like stopping"
id:6c2f633198202c2399761f70ec34919b.ai_summary: Uno-X Mobility has announced that Magnus Cort Nielsen will end his career at the end of the season. The 33-year-old Dane, a two-time Tour de France stage winner, hopes to shine one last time in July's Grande Boucle.

id:82bbd6a6bba5307743d7bebd69bd5a69.title: Pascal Chanteur, président du syndicat des coureurs : «Pourquoi, nous, les cyclistes, on serait obligés de courir sous 45 °C ?»
id:82bbd6a6bba5307743d7bebd69bd5a69.summary: Pascal Chanteur, le président l'Union nationale des cyclistes professionnels (UNCP), invite à modifier les horaires des courses lors des périodes de fortes chaleurs, comme ce week-end à La Tour-du-Pin pour les Championnats de France, afin de préserver la santé des coureurs.
id:82bbd6a6bba5307743d7bebd69bd5a69.ai_title: Pascal Chanteur: Why should cyclists be forced to race in 45C heat?
id:82bbd6a6bba5307743d7bebd69bd5a69.ai_summary: Pascal Chanteur, president of the Union nationale des cyclistes professionnels (UNCP), says race schedules should be changed during periods of extreme heat, such as this weekend in La Tour-du-Pin for the French Championships, to protect riders' health.

id:96c128c2b9cf3be8b08d6a5b60ab15a9.title: David Gaudu sur sa situation chez Groupama-FDJ United avant les Championnats de France : « On ira jusqu'au bout du contrat »
id:96c128c2b9cf3be8b08d6a5b60ab15a9.summary: Vendredi, avant les Championnats de France, David Gaudu s'est exprimé en zone mixte sur sa non-sélection pour le prochain Tour de France et la polémique le concernant chez Groupama-FDJ United.
id:96c128c2b9cf3be8b08d6a5b60ab15a9.ai_title: David Gaudu speaks about his situation at Groupama-FDJ United before the French Championships: “We will go to the end of the contract”
id:96c128c2b9cf3be8b08d6a5b60ab15a9.ai_summary: On Friday, before the French Championships, David Gaudu spoke in the mixed zone about not being selected for the upcoming Tour de France and the controversy surrounding him at Groupama-FDJ United.

id:08ca3e4587cc01d741113064a6d8ac29.title: Entre flou et optimisme, où en est vraiment la formation TotalEnergies ?
id:08ca3e4587cc01d741113064a6d8ac29.summary: La formation vendéenne TotalEnergies devrait prochainement faire quelques annonces pour l'avenir de la structure, à différents échelons, au coeur d'une année marquée par la recherche d'un sponsor.
id:08ca3e4587cc01d741113064a6d8ac29.ai_title: TotalEnergies: uncertainty remains despite signs of optimism
id:08ca3e4587cc01d741113064a6d8ac29.ai_summary: The Vendée-based TotalEnergies team is expected to make announcements soon about the future of the structure at several levels, in a year marked by the search for a sponsor.

id:e0e41232aacf3cbdc6bf5b94d7f39793.title: Géry, Kerbaol, Squiban... Qui sont nos favorites pour la victoire dans la course en ligne au Championnat de France ?
id:e0e41232aacf3cbdc6bf5b94d7f39793.summary: En grande forme et sur un circuit taillé à son profil de puncheuse, Célia Géry, 20 ans, semble être la meilleure carte de FDJ United-Suez, samedi à La Tour-du-Pin (à partir de 14h sur Eurosport, disponible sur L'Équipe), alors que Cédrine Kerbaol et Maëva Squiban devront se débrouiller seules.
id:e0e41232aacf3cbdc6bf5b94d7f39793.ai_title: Géry, Kerbaol, Squiban... Who are the favourites for the French road race title?
id:e0e41232aacf3cbdc6bf5b94d7f39793.ai_summary: In great form and on a circuit suited to her puncheur style, 20-year-old Célia Géry looks like FDJ United-Suez's best card on Saturday in La Tour-du-Pin (from 14:00 on Eurosport, available on L'Équipe), while Cédrine Kerbaol and Maëva Squiban will have to fend for themselves.

id:519142f9b307ba440d0add7f73ea7c3a.title: Célia Géry, « la force tranquille » à la conquête d'un premier titre aux Championnats de France  : « C'est déjà une cadre de l'équipe »
id:519142f9b307ba440d0add7f73ea7c3a.summary: Un an après sa 2e place chez les Espoirs sur le même circuit, Célia Géry, 20 ans, revient à La Tour-du-Pin avec un statut de favorite, samedi, pour la course élite.
id:519142f9b307ba440d0add7f73ea7c3a.ai_title: Célia Géry, the 'calm force' chasing a first title at the French Championships
id:519142f9b307ba440d0add7f73ea7c3a.ai_summary: A year after finishing second in the U23 race on the same course, 20-year-old Célia Géry returns to La Tour-du-Pin as one of the favorites for Saturday's elite race.

id:5e503670590db59b2dfbab74f1ea32be.title: Sans Remco Evenepoel, Alec Segaert sacré champion de Belgique du contre-la-montre
id:5e503670590db59b2dfbab74f1ea32be.summary: Le coureur de Bahrain Victorious Alec Segaert est devenu ce vendredi champion de Belgique du contre-la-montre, pour la première fois, alors que le spécialiste mondial de l'exercice Remco Evenepoel était absent.
id:5e503670590db59b2dfbab74f1ea32be.ai_title: Alec Segaert crowned Belgian time trial champion in Remco Evenepoel's absence
id:5e503670590db59b2dfbab74f1ea32be.ai_summary: Bahrain Victorious rider Alec Segaert became Belgian time trial champion for the first time on Friday, with world specialist Remco Evenepoel absent.

id:4d90b08d0b7cfd1e15d853946e486957.title: Pourquoi Pauline-Ferrand Prévôt ne dispute pas les Championnats de France : « Elle donne tout pour la préparation du Tour »
id:4d90b08d0b7cfd1e15d853946e486957.summary: Comme l'an passé, Pauline Ferrand-Prévôt ne sera pas au départ du Championnat de France, samedi à La Tour-du-Pin. Une absence prévue de longue date, dédiée à optimiser sa préparation en vue du Tour de France, dont le départ sera donné le 1er août à Lausanne.
id:4d90b08d0b7cfd1e15d853946e486957.ai_title: Why Pauline-Ferrand Prévôt is not racing the French Championships
id:4d90b08d0b7cfd1e15d853946e486957.ai_summary: As last year, Pauline Ferrand-Prévôt will not start the French Championships on Saturday in La Tour-du-Pin. The planned absence is intended to optimize her preparation for the Tour de France, which starts on August 1 in Lausanne.

id:d34fb0500a33ea97046ff59a27bd0983.title: « Je ne lui vois pas de limite » : titrée sur le chrono, Célia Le Mouël, remise de ses blessures, fait briller Ma Petite Entreprise
id:d34fb0500a33ea97046ff59a27bd0983.summary: Admirative de son amie qui lui a ravi son titre jeudi en Isère, Cédrine Kerbaol (3e) prédit un bel avenir à Célia Le Mouël, 25 ans, la nouvelle championne de France du contre-la-montre, qui fut longtemps freinée par les blessures.
id:d34fb0500a33ea97046ff59a27bd0983.ai_title: "I don't see any limits for her": time trial champion Célia Le Mouël, back from injury, shines for Ma Petite Entreprise
id:d34fb0500a33ea97046ff59a27bd0983.ai_summary: Admiring her friend, who took her title on Thursday in Isère, Cédrine Kerbaol (3rd) predicts a bright future for Célia Le Mouël, 25, the new French time trial champion, who was long held back by injuries.

id:a9adee68ef96e3685874e57e45dfc219.title: Prévu au départ de Barcelone pour son dernier Tour de France, Pello Bilbao doit finalement renoncer
id:a9adee68ef96e3685874e57e45dfc219.summary: Initialement prévu au départ du Tour de France (du 4 au 26 juillet) avec la formation Bahrain Victorious, Pello Bilbao (36 ans) doit finalement renoncer. L'Espagnol est insuffisamment remis d'une infection virale.
id:a9adee68ef96e3685874e57e45dfc219.ai_title: Set to start in Barcelona for his final Tour de France, Pello Bilbao must withdraw
id:a9adee68ef96e3685874e57e45dfc219.ai_summary: Initially scheduled to start the Tour de France (July 4-26) with Bahrain Victorious, Pello Bilbao (36) must withdraw. The Spaniard has not recovered sufficiently from a viral infection.

id:a1c437866bebc48ef4183ff1c790a34f.title: Troisième titre de champion de France du chrono pour Rémi Cavagna qui confirme sa montée en puissance : « J'ai retrouvé l'envie et le moral »
id:a1c437866bebc48ef4183ff1c790a34f.summary: Après 2020 et 2023, Rémi Cavagna a décroché un nouveau titre de champion de France du chrono. Qui récompense sa montée en puissance cette année et un retour à son meilleur niveau.
id:a1c437866bebc48ef4183ff1c790a34f.ai_title: Rémi Cavagna wins a third French time trial title and confirms his rise: "I've regained my desire and my morale"
id:a1c437866bebc48ef4183ff1c790a34f.ai_summary: After 2020 and 2023, Rémi Cavagna has claimed another French time trial title. It rewards his strong form this year and a return to his best level.

id:0255f49303cd437fe052d0ad9506593e.title: Rémi Cavagna, champion de France du contre-la-montre : «Retrouver ce maillot, c'est une confirmation»
id:0255f49303cd437fe052d0ad9506593e.summary: Le Clermontois Rémi Cavagna (30 ans) a décroché ce jeudi en Isère son troisième titre de champion de France du contre-la-montre, devant Bruno Armirail et son coéquipier chez Groupama-FDJ Ewen Costiou.
id:0255f49303cd437fe052d0ad9506593e.ai_title: Rémi Cavagna, French time trial champion: "Getting this jersey back is a confirmation"
id:0255f49303cd437fe052d0ad9506593e.ai_summary: The Clermont native Rémi Cavagna (30) won his third French time trial title on Thursday in Isère, ahead of Bruno Armirail and his Groupama-FDJ teammate Ewen Costiou.

id:090a3ff3eb22dbca7619bc0fa74224d8.title: Célia Le Mouël, championne de France inattendue du contre-la-montre : «Ça dépasse toutes mes attentes»
id:090a3ff3eb22dbca7619bc0fa74224d8.summary: Célia Le Mouël (Ma Petite Entreprise) a signé une énorme surprise en devenant championne de France du contre-la-montre, ce jeudi à La Tour-du-Pin (Isère), devant les favorites Maëva Squiban (2e), Cédrine Kerbaol (3e) et Juliette Berthet (4e). En conférence de presse, et avant de revêtir son maillot tricolore qu'elle portera cet été sur le Tour de France, la Bretonne de 25 ans n'en revenait toujours pas.
id:090a3ff3eb22dbca7619bc0fa74224d8.ai_title: Unexpected French time trial champion Célia Le Mouël: "It exceeds all my expectations"
id:090a3ff3eb22dbca7619bc0fa74224d8.ai_summary: Célia Le Mouël (Ma Petite Entreprise) pulled off a huge surprise by becoming French time trial champion on Thursday in La Tour-du-Pin (Isère), ahead of the favorites Maëva Squiban (2nd), Cédrine Kerbaol (3rd) and Juliette Berthet (4th). In her press conference, and before putting on her tricolor jersey that she will wear this summer at the Tour de France, the 25-year-old Breton could hardly believe it.

id:9f29d9a245f5f4fc9f038010228e6409.title: Alexis Renard prolonge chez Cofidis jusqu'en 2028
id:9f29d9a245f5f4fc9f038010228e6409.summary: Deuxième du dernier Tro Bro Leon, Alexis Renard prolonge son bail chez Cofidis. Le Breton (27 ans) est désormais liée à la formation nordiste jusqu'en 2028.
id:9f29d9a245f5f4fc9f038010228e6409.ai_title: Alexis Renard extends with Cofidis until 2028
id:9f29d9a245f5f4fc9f038010228e6409.ai_summary: Runner-up at the latest Tro Bro Leon, Alexis Renard has extended his deal with Cofidis. The 27-year-old Breton is now tied to the northern team until 2028.

id:a29fc496b3bbcd7da7e2252b1ff073aa.title: Rémi Cavagna survole le contre-la-montre des Championnats de France de cyclisme et retrouve sa couronne
id:a29fc496b3bbcd7da7e2252b1ff073aa.summary: Ce jeudi, Rémi Cavagna a été le plus rapide à parcourir les 29,7 kilomètres entre Aoste et La Tour-du-Pin, dans l'Isère. Il remporte le contre-la-montre masculin des Championnats de France de cyclisme pour la troisième fois de sa carrière.
id:a29fc496b3bbcd7da7e2252b1ff073aa.ai_title: Rémi Cavagna dominates the French Cycling Championships time trial and regains his crown
id:a29fc496b3bbcd7da7e2252b1ff073aa.ai_summary: On Thursday, Rémi Cavagna was the fastest over the 29.7 kilometers between Aoste and La Tour-du-Pin, in Isère. He wins the men's time trial at the French Cycling Championships for the third time in his career.

id:707ed42b90d3949ca53be843d6b96562.title: Intouchable, Filippo Ganna est sacré champion d'Italie du contre-la-montre pour la septième fois
id:707ed42b90d3949ca53be843d6b96562.summary: Sur une autre planète, Filippo Ganna est devenu champion d'Italie du contre-la-montre, ce jeudi. Le coureur de Netcompany-Ineos (29 ans) poursuit sa razzia en décrochant son septième titre national du chrono.
id:707ed42b90d3949ca53be843d6b96562.ai_title: Filippo Ganna wins seventh Italian time trial title
id:707ed42b90d3949ca53be843d6b96562.ai_summary: Filippo Ganna dominated to become Italian time trial champion on Thursday. The Netcompany-Ineos rider, 29, continued his run of success with a seventh national time trial title.

id:b4d1832552d90e7a9baf99961ddc3857.title: Célia Le Mouël s'impose sur le contre-la-montre des Championnats de France
id:b4d1832552d90e7a9baf99961ddc3857.summary: Le contre-la-montre féminin avait lieu ce jeudi lors des Championnats de France de cyclisme. Célia Le Mouël a été la plus rapide à couvrir les 29,7 kilomètres entre Aoste et La Tour-du-Pin, dans l'Isère.
id:b4d1832552d90e7a9baf99961ddc3857.ai_title: Célia Le Mouël wins the French Championships time trial
id:b4d1832552d90e7a9baf99961ddc3857.ai_summary: The women's time trial took place on Thursday at the French Cycling Championships. Célia Le Mouël was fastest over the 29.7 kilometers between Aoste and La Tour-du-Pin in Isère.

id:50cb53e6d2b8173d361f4fb80c9d5f84.title: La composition de NSN pour le Tour de France 2026, avec Biniam Girmay pour jouer les étapes
id:50cb53e6d2b8173d361f4fb80c9d5f84.summary: Pour sa première participation en tant que NSN, l'équipe suisse s'appuiera sur Biniam Girmay en leader sur le Tour de France 2026, du 4 au 26 juillet. Le Français Matîs Louvel fait également partie de l'équipe dévoilée ce jeudi.
id:50cb53e6d2b8173d361f4fb80c9d5f84.ai_title: NSN's Tour de France 2026 lineup includes Biniam Girmay for the stages
id:50cb53e6d2b8173d361f4fb80c9d5f84.ai_summary: In its first Tour de France as NSN, the Swiss team will rely on Biniam Girmay as its leader for the 2026 edition, from 4 to 26 July. French rider Matîs Louvel is also in the squad announced on Thursday.

id:35f3b60cebf066106946bbdf41666085.title: Blessé à une épaule, Oscar Onley déclare forfait pour le Tour de France
id:35f3b60cebf066106946bbdf41666085.summary: Touché à une épaule lors d'une chute sur le Tour Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes mi-juin, Oscar Onley (Netcompany-Ineos) a déclaré forfait ce jeudi pour le Tour de France. L'Écossais avait terminé au pied du podium en 2025.
id:35f3b60cebf066106946bbdf41666085.ai_title: Shoulder injury forces Oscar Onley out of the Tour de France
id:35f3b60cebf066106946bbdf41666085.ai_summary: Oscar Onley (Netcompany-Ineos) has withdrawn from the Tour de France after injuring his shoulder in a crash at the Tour Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes in mid-June. The Scot finished just off the podium in 2025.

id:876d1abb1dbd0b69c88d66b4b01f79fa.title: Les Championnats du Venezuela annulés à cause des deux puissants séismes ayant touché le pays
id:876d1abb1dbd0b69c88d66b4b01f79fa.summary: Frappé par deux séismes de magnitudes 7,2 et 7,5 mercredi, le Venezuela a annulé ses Championnats nationaux de cyclisme planifiés du 24 au 28 juin. Aucune date de report n'a été annoncée.
id:876d1abb1dbd0b69c88d66b4b01f79fa.ai_title: Venezuela national championships canceled after two powerful earthquakes
id:876d1abb1dbd0b69c88d66b4b01f79fa.ai_summary: After being hit by two earthquakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 on Wednesday, Venezuela has canceled its national cycling championships scheduled for June 24-28. No new date has been announced.

id:fff0868bd3da874ef513ad9db385fd24.title: Favorite du contre-la-montre des Championnats de France, Cédrine Kerbaol devra se méfier de Juliette Berthet et Maëva  Squiban
id:fff0868bd3da874ef513ad9db385fd24.summary: La tenante du titre Cédrine Kerbaol part avec les faveurs du pronostic dans l'exigeant contre-la-montre des Championnats de France jeudi. Mais Juliette Berthet et Maëva Squiban espèrent bien lui résister.
id:fff0868bd3da874ef513ad9db385fd24.ai_title: Cédrine Kerbaol favorite for French time trial title, with Juliette Berthet and Maëva Squiban as threats
id:fff0868bd3da874ef513ad9db385fd24.ai_summary: Reigning champion Cédrine Kerbaol starts as the favorite in Thursday’s demanding French Championships time trial. But Juliette Berthet and Maëva Squiban hope to challenge her.

id:1aada13a44d90f0e0daf0abf15a3e6df.title: Bruno Armirail, avant le contre-la-montre des Championnats de France dont il est le vainqueur sortant : « Je ne l'ai pas du tout préparé, j'y vais au talent »
id:1aada13a44d90f0e0daf0abf15a3e6df.summary: Vainqueur de trois des quatre derniers contre-la-montre nationaux, dont les deux derniers, le rouleur de Visma Lease-a-bike Bruno Armirail redescend d'altitude sans connaître réellement son état de forme.
id:1aada13a44d90f0e0daf0abf15a3e6df.ai_title: Bruno Armirail on the French Championships time trial: “I haven’t prepared it at all, I’m going on talent”
id:1aada13a44d90f0e0daf0abf15a3e6df.ai_summary: Winner of three of the last four national time trials, including the last two, Visma Lease-a-bike rouleur Bruno Armirail is coming down from altitude without really knowing his form.

id:1aa266f54ee588674064f53351f59da9.title: David Gaudu, sans doute absent sur le Tour de France, cristallise les tensions au  sein de l'équipe Groupama-FDJ United
id:1aa266f54ee588674064f53351f59da9.summary: Alors qu'il n'a pas couru depuis plus d'un mois, David Gaudu, récemment devenu papa, ne devrait pas être aligné au départ du Tour de France, le 4 juillet prochain à Barcelone. Une absence logique et attendue, mais cet échec suscite des remous au sein de son équipe Groupama-FDJ United.
id:1aa266f54ee588674064f53351f59da9.ai_title: David Gaudu likely to miss the Tour de France, stirring tension at Groupama-FDJ United
id:1aa266f54ee588674064f53351f59da9.ai_summary: David Gaudu has not raced for more than a month and, after recently becoming a father, is unlikely to start the Tour de France on July 4 in Barcelona. The expected absence is logical, but it has caused unrest within Groupama-FDJ United.

id:8838dd9fa1a93748f8bbfcd8f53944ff.title: La liste des équipes et de tous les coureurs engagés sur le Tour de France 2026
id:8838dd9fa1a93748f8bbfcd8f53944ff.summary: À l'approche du Tour de France, les 23 équipes annoncent progressivement la liste des coureurs qu'elles enverront de Barcelone à Paris entre le 4 et le 26 juillet. Voici les effectifs déjà connus. Ils seront mis à jour au fur et à mesure des officialisations.
id:8838dd9fa1a93748f8bbfcd8f53944ff.ai_title: The list of teams and riders entered for the Tour de France 2026
id:8838dd9fa1a93748f8bbfcd8f53944ff.ai_summary: As the Tour de France approaches, the 23 teams are gradually announcing the riders they will send from Barcelona to Paris between July 4 and 26. Here are the squads known so far, updated as entries are confirmed.

id:79312f75b93761582955bfc3e2f763b0.ai_title: French Elite Track Championships 2026 in Bourges: a successful edition
id:79312f75b93761582955bfc3e2f763b0.ai_summary: The Bourges velodrome is part of the CREPS Centre-Val de Loire, which owns and manages it. id:ff925fa70e7c82bb1ff521b3cb2400c1.ai_summary: A total of 89 teams have been accepted across the national categories: 58 men’s National Route teams and 31 women’s National Route teams. id:a869d718f8d1c6abac3cb4fd41dc7128.summary: Cet événement représente un moment majeur dans la vie fédérale, réunissant l’ensemble des acteurs du cyclisme français autour de la rencontre, du partage d’expériences et de la réflexion sur l’avenir de notre discipline. id:a869d718f8d1c6abac3cb4fd41dc7128.ai_title: Call for applications to host the 2027-2030 Federal Congress
id:a869d718f8d1c6abac3cb4fd41dc7128.ai_summary: This event is a major moment in the life of the federation, bringing together everyone involved in French cycling for discussion, sharing experience and reflecting on the future of the sport. It is a unique opportunity for local organizations to showcase their region, highlight their dynamism and take part in the event.

id:214dd3419d1e2950a830d6f64200db7f.title: La FFC renforce son rayonnement par un partenariat stratégique avec la Chine

id:214dd3419d1e2950a830d6f64200db7f.ai_title: The FFC strengthens its reach through a strategic partnership with China
id:214dd3419d1e2950a830d6f64200db7f.ai_summary: This agreement, in place until 2028, positions the FFC as a major player in supporting the development of cycling worldwide, both in sporting and structural, educational and event terms. The official signing took place in Beijing, under the auspices of the French authorities.

id:febccda06f323c0ba05420ab7b9c92cb.title: Formation Commissaire National Elite BMX 2026

Led by Séverine Schreckenberg and Quentin Berton, both experienced UCI Commissaires, the session offers in-depth, practical training.

id:32329d1b3510116d248da63c494f3c94.ai_summary: On Wednesday, December 10, 2025, the FFC detected an unauthorized intrusion into its information system, which took place overnight from Tuesday, December 9 to Wednesday, December 10, 2025. id:7576b54b544fb7029b182c5e3a112b6b.ai_title: FFC medical congress: health as the best performance factor
id:7576b54b544fb7029b182c5e3a112b6b.ai_summary: The purpose of this event is to encourage exchanges between medical experts and performance staff, especially coaches and sport scientists, as well as researchers and physiotherapists, explains Éric Meinadier, the federal doctor who initiated the event with Emmanuel Brunet, former head of the research unit.

id:993e204ad2fa0168bacd4a049741d983.ai_summary: This partnership was an obvious choice because of the geographical proximity and the shared values of the two organizations. This long-term collaboration aims to give every cyclist the best conditions to improve, perform and thrive.

id:be07952fdce1d216a27ea4548fcccaab.ai_title: Génération Arbitre Vélo 2027: young riders invited to become referees
id:be07952fdce1d216a27ea4548fcccaab.ai_summary: The program aims to train a new generation of young referees, targeting candidates aged 17 to 21, born between 2005 and 2009. id:63004d037250c4cdfb4f3a465b5980fc.ai_summary: Jean-Christophe Péraud has followed an unusual path. His career reflects versatility, determination, humility, and a successful transition. He did not take the classic route to becoming a professional rider. Before focusing fully on road cycling, he first excelled in cross-country mountain biking.

id:13745a191646574d1a7b2b5360411677.title: Dirigeants, éducateurs : devenez acteur d’un cyclisme sans violence

Il-elle intervient auprès de publics variés : En organisant des ateliers […]

id:99ec899b4e9045be3facdae9880389d7.ai_summary: Within clubs affiliated with the Fédération Française de Cyclisme (FFC), the socio-sporting educator has a hybrid role between sports coaching and social support. The goal is to use cycling as a tool for education, inclusion, and personal development, making the sport accessible to everyone. They work with a wide range of groups by organizing workshops.

id:88c8b6519ec03263fc5a77e185225b61.title: David Lappartient reconduit à la présidence de l’UCI lors du 194e Congrès, à Kigali
id:88c8b6519ec03263fc5a77e185225b61.summary: C’est au Rwanda, à Kigali, dans le cadre des Championnats du Monde 2025, que s’est tenu aujourd’hui le 194e Congrès de l’Union Cycliste Internationale. À l’issue de cette journée historique pour le cyclisme africain, David Lappartient a été réélu à la présidence de l’UCI, confirmant la confiance placée en lui par la communauté cycliste mondiale. […]
id:88c8b6519ec03263fc5a77e185225b61.ai_title: David Lappartient re-elected UCI president at the 194th Congress in Kigali
id:88c8b6519ec03263fc5a77e185225b61.ai_summary: In Rwanda, in Kigali, during the 2025 World Championships, the 194th Congress of the Union Cycliste Internationale took place today. At the end of this historic day for African cycling, David Lappartient was re-elected as UCI president, confirming the confidence of the global cycling community.

id:467f0f26e8becacb1846cacfa57ab4f1.title: 20 años del Tour más loco: “Nunca volverá a pasar algo así”
id:467f0f26e8becacb1846cacfa57ab4f1.summary: El 1 de julio de 2006 arrancaba un Tour raro: sin Armstrong, con la Operación Puerto caliente... y sin Óscar Pereiro, el campeón, en ninguna quiniela.

id:467f0f26e8becacb1846cacfa57ab4f1.ai_summary: The 2006 Tour de France began on 1 July under unusual circumstances: no Armstrong, Operación Puerto dominating the backdrop, and Óscar Pereiro, the eventual champion, absent from all pre-race predictions.

id:43b0e98bb2798ff94657362b721ef50b.title: Uijtdebroeks liderará al Movistar en un Tour sin Mas

id:ea931c079c1e58c8b10a9b6eb45e024c.summary: El segoviano arrancará en septiembre un proyecto para viajar por distintas partes del mundo en bicicleta. Estará un año comentando el Tour.

id:ea931c079c1e58c8b10a9b6eb45e024c.ai_summary: The rider from Segovia will begin a new project in September, traveling by bike through different parts of the world. He will spend a year commentating on the Tour.

id:a6ed4efb5c7cbbaa354af755681cee04.title: El Kern Pharma lucha por sobrevivir: La Vuelta es la fecha límite
id:a6ed4efb5c7cbbaa354af755681cee04.summary: El equipo, que busca patrocionador, todavía no tiene nada firmado aunque sí conversaciones. Según pudo saber AS, antes de La Vuelta esperan una resolución.

id:a6ed4efb5c7cbbaa354af755681cee04.ai_summary: Kern Pharma are still searching for a sponsor and have not signed a deal yet, although talks are ongoing. According to AS, they expect a resolution before La Vuelta.

id:d08bec2d5ed557721c302687a7ad5cce.title: El error más caro en el mantenimiento de tu bici: apurar la cadena o las pastillas hasta que revientan cassette y discos
id:d08bec2d5ed557721c302687a7ad5cce.summary: Retrasar el cambio de una cadena o unas pastillas parece ahorrar dinero, pero provoca justo lo contrario. Así se desgastan cassette y discos.

id:d08bec2d5ed557721c302687a7ad5cce.ai_summary: Delaying the replacement of a chain or brake pads may seem like a way to save money, but it often causes more expensive damage by wearing out the cassette and brake discs.

id:8728291d8b539d035f3e8f19bfa6e4cb.ai_summary: Lidl-Trek presented in Barcelona the team for this year’s Tour de France, with Juan Ayuso as the squad’s leader.

id:ad0bec04b002eb88be8efa8b761fbb1c.summary: La organización de la Grande Boucle aplica un cálculo matemático para categorizar cada uno de los puertos de su recorrido. También hay criterios subjetivos.

id:ad0bec04b002eb88be8efa8b761fbb1c.ai_summary: The organisers of the Grande Boucle use a mathematical calculation to classify each climb on the route. There are also subjective criteria.

id:0be84cb2c1cad6e702ec3d71d8cffd63.title: Los “duros meses” de Roger Adrià: “Mentalmente se pasa mal”
id:0be84cb2c1cad6e702ec3d71d8cffd63.summary: El catalán, “con problemas físicos y de alergia” durante casi toda la temporada en su estreno en el Movistar. “Ojalá logre hacer un reset”, desea en AS.

id:0be84cb2c1cad6e702ec3d71d8cffd63.ai_summary: The Catalan rider has had physical and allergy problems for almost the entire season in his first year at Movistar. “I hope he can reset,” he says in AS.

id:b90d74edfd872a19219dd192af24f269.ai_summary: The main favorites for elite time trial gold at the National Championships, a benchmark in European cycling, lived up to expectations.

id:92275ac126f684e631f0a8a6d2a6ec10.summary: El del Red Bull Bora no irá a los campeonatos de su país, que son de obligada participación. Con un certificado médico puede ausentarse sin sanción.

id:298ac37877c5c83d8e5106081bbeb64c.ai_summary: The Ecuadorian rider has renewed with UAE Team Emirates through 2029.

id:6de5484bcdc6108053ef8d548462aa1d.summary: El esloveno se proclama campeón de la ronda suiza, tachando de su lista otra carrera histórica de una semana. Ya sólo le queda la Itzulia.

id:6de5484bcdc6108053ef8d548462aa1d.ai_summary: The Slovenian is crowned champion of the Swiss race, adding another historic one-week stage race to his list. Only Itzulia remains.

id:4e54cab1462b2613635029e6b4dcefcd.ai_summary: The Alpecin-Deceuninck rider has been sanctioned by the UCI after taking off his skinsuit during the live broadcast.

id:1c2287f4a1464e3f10caabc2e43b1948.ai_summary: The Catalan rider triumphed on home roads to win the Volta a Cataluña for the first time. Ostiz fought for the victory on the final stage, which was won by Vos.

id:efd7c5137be7d708647acf6c20f0ba39.ai_summary: The Movistar Team rider claimed victory in her home country for the third time after 100 kilometers in which Elisa Longo Borghini never found her best form.

id:6d26acb18e5d818cea97251e355c27f5.title: Pinchazo en el Tour de Francia: la bolsa de premios cae
id:6d26acb18e5d818cea97251e355c27f5.summary: La ronda francesa, que reparte la mayor cuantía del ecosistema ciclista, la reduce en 2.450 euros respecto al curso anterior.
id:6d26acb18e5d818cea97251e355c27f5.ai_title: Tour de France prize money reduced
id:6d26acb18e5d818cea97251e355c27f5.ai_summary: The French Grand Tour, which offers the biggest prize purse in cycling, will pay 2,450 euros less than last year.

id:d62fd7b68475c319a74e1079110189f4.ai_summary: The Slovenian won the Tour de Suisse time trial by 31 hundredths of a second over Van der Poel. His girlfriend had suffered a serious crash on Thursday in the women’s race.

id:3ca19639ad35b7aea77b9341f15e572c.title: Pogacar aspira a igualar a Anquetil, Merckx, Hinault e Indurain en el Olimpo de los pentacampeones - Palmarés y ganadores del Tour de Francia

id:7de42a8cf504b1638434e413b6d33db6.title: Netcompany Ineos míří na Tour de France hlavně za etapami. První velkou šanci nabízí úvodní časovka družstev
id:7de42a8cf504b1638434e413b6d33db6.summary: Největším favoritem úvodní týmové časovky je britský tým Netcompany Ineos, který si do Barcelony přiváží samé těžké váhy mezi časovkáři. V sestavě nechybí šampioni Filippo Ganna, Joshua Tarling a Tobias Foss. Silnými časovkáři jsou také Thymen Arensman, Dorian Godon, Kévin Vauquelin, Egan Bernal a Michał Kwiatkowski. Pokud by v Barceloně nevyhráli, bylo by to překvapení.

id:1d33c3b6afc3f2fa8548926c381154c6.title: Úvodní den Solidarnosci nepoznal ve dvou půletapách jiného vítěze, než Marcela Boguslawského! ATT Investments tak rozšířil sbírku prvenství na devět
id:1d33c3b6afc3f2fa8548926c381154c6.summary: Course Cycliste de Solidarnosc et des Champions Olympiques (2.2) začal dvěma půletapami. Obě dospěly do hromadné koncovky a obě vyhrál po výborném týmovém výkonu sprinter ATT Investments Marceli Boguslawski. Ještě jsou před námi tři dny závodění, do nich vstupuje polský rychlík coby držitel žlutého a bílého dresu a česká sestava jako týmová jednička. Zatím tedy první den přinesl kromě dvou prvenství, které rozšířily týmovou sezónní sbírku z UCI závodů na devět, také dalších 16 UCI bodů.
id:1d33c3b6afc3f2fa8548926c381154c6.ai_title: Marceli Boguslawski wins both opening half-stages of Course Cycliste de Solidarnosc et des Champions Olympiques
id:1d33c3b6afc3f2fa8548926c381154c6.ai_summary: Course Cycliste de Solidarnosc et des Champions Olympiques (2.2) opened with two half-stages. Both ended in bunch sprints, and both were won by ATT Investments sprinter Marceli Boguslawski after strong team performances. With three days still to race, the Polish rider leads the yellow and white jersey classifications, while the Czech team tops the team standings. The two wins raise ATT Investments' season total in UCI races to nine and add 16 more UCI points.

id:65991269766efec9f43c9788996a567f.title: Ayuso chce pódium, Pedersen zase zelený dres. Sladí v týmu Lidl-Trek zájmy obou lídrů?

The question is whether both goals can work within the same team.

id:2f84ccfb008853c414ce3691e6e841f7.title: Óscar Pereiro no se corta: en silencio hasta que suene un ciclista mejor que é´l: ¿con quién alza la voz?
id:2f84ccfb008853c414ce3691e6e841f7.summary: Han pasado 20 años ya desde que Óscar Pereiro logró aquel Tour de Francia. Por ello, MARCA ha querido rememorar su victoria con varios retos. En este, el corredor gallego se enfrenta a decisiones muy difíciles: ¿habrá sido mejor ciclista que estos otros corredores de su época?

id:0f620211194a7810c7db5c0b162d8bba.title: Cómo ha cambiado la vida en 20 años, desde el Tour de Pereiro: ¿Sabe Óscar quién ganó cada título en el deporte en 2006?
id:0f620211194a7810c7db5c0b162d8bba.summary: Veinte años después del Tour que cambió su vida, Óscar Pereiro se somete a un viaje exprés a 2006 para comprobar cuánto recuerda de aquel año inolvidable. De la Champions del Barça al Mundial de Italia, del Balón de Oro de Cannavaro al Mundial de baloncesto de España, pasando por Nadal, Federer, Alonso o la NBA de Miami, el gallego acepta el reto de MARCA entre recuerdos, dudas y algún patinazo simpático. ¿Sigue teniendo tan fresco aquel 2006 como su victoria en París? Curiosamente falla una de ciclismo al pensar que ese año ganó Valverde... cuando ganó Vinokourov.
id:0f620211194a7810c7db5c0b162d8bba.ai_title: Óscar Pereiro tests his memory of 2006, 20 years after his Tour win
id:0f620211194a7810c7db5c0b162d8bba.ai_summary: Twenty years after the Tour that changed his life, Óscar Pereiro looks back at 2006 to see how much he remembers from that unforgettable year. From Barcelona’s Champions League title and Italy’s World Cup win to Fabio Cannavaro’s Ballon d’Or, Spain’s basketball world title, and the seasons of Nadal, Federer, Alonso and the Miami Heat, the Galician takes on MARCA’s quiz with memories, doubts and a few amusing mistakes. He even gets one cycling answer wrong, thinking Valverde won that year when it was Vinokourov.

id:30e5afb184e80fd6f278da0860697e1a.ai_summary: Tadej Pogacar will start the Tour de France on Saturday with a new haircut. The Slovenian favorite has shaved his hair short and bleached it. Last winter, Pogacar already surprised with a hairstyle inspired by one of his favorite artists, rapper Eminem.

id:3c087c3c67802184d8c6b8de331f9963.title: Groupama FDJ-United breekt met traditie van sponsorloze kampioenstrui
id:3c087c3c67802184d8c6b8de331f9963.summary: Groupama FDJ-United viel jarenlang op met zijn strakke kampioenstruien. Het was de gewoonte om daar geen (grote) sponsoruitingen op te zetten. Maar aan die traditie lijkt nu toch een eind te komen. Op de zijkant van de Franse kampioenstrui van Romain Grégoire prijkt namelijk groot 'Groupama'.
id:3c087c3c67802184d8c6b8de331f9963.ai_title: Groupama FDJ-United ends its tradition of sponsor-free champion jerseys
id:3c087c3c67802184d8c6b8de331f9963.ai_summary: Groupama FDJ-United has long stood out for its clean champion jerseys without major sponsor logos. That tradition now appears to be ending, with 'Groupama' prominently displayed on the side of Romain Grégoire's French champion jersey.

id:268ea92dd94e65af5a67b859100a4cf5.title: Zorgen om koninginnenrit in de Tour: modderstromen zorgen voor wegverzakking
id:268ea92dd94e65af5a67b859100a4cf5.summary: De Tour de France moet nog beginnen, maar de organisatie zal wellicht al het parcours van de koninginnenrit naar Alpe d'Huez moeten aanpassen. id:268ea92dd94e65af5a67b859100a4cf5.ai_title: Tour queen stage under threat after mudslides cause road collapse
id:268ea92dd94e65af5a67b859100a4cf5.ai_summary: The Tour de France has not yet started, but organisers may already need to alter the route of the queen stage to Alpe d'Huez. Extreme weather over recent weeks has caused the asphalt on the Col de Sarenne to crumble twice.

id:c9cf8c3b42d7577beae11726f0fed4bb.title: Touraanloop van Jonas Vingegaard werd even ‘verstoord’ door… Donald Trump
id:c9cf8c3b42d7577beae11726f0fed4bb.summary: In de weken voor de Tour de France verbleef Jonas Vingegaard op hoogte in het Franse Tignes. id:c9cf8c3b42d7577beae11726f0fed4bb.ai_title: Jonas Vingegaard's Tour build-up was briefly disrupted by Donald Trump

id:537b7f84482ffd6a1c540e4bf1ef81b0.ai_title: Movistar has no need to worry about its future for now

Last month it emerged that Telefónica, the company behind Movistar, wanted to stop sponsoring the team. Team manager Eusebio Unzué, however, is urging calm.

id:84503e4cdef649298af7ebaf0895c8a7.title: Junioren en U23 baanwielrenners gaan vlammen op EK in Cottbus
id:84503e4cdef649298af7ebaf0895c8a7.summary: In Duitsland worden volgende week de Europese Kampioenschappen Baanwielrennen georganiseerd voor de junioren en U23! Op de half overdekte baan in Cottbus, tegen de Poolse grens, komt de Nederlandse selectie voornamelijk in actie op de duuronderdelen.

id:84503e4cdef649298af7ebaf0895c8a7.ai_summary: The European Track Championships for junior and U23 riders will take place in Germany next week. On the partly covered track in Cottbus, near the Polish border, the Dutch team will mainly compete in the endurance events.

id:483529ce566f746ba730675316b6dee9.title: Conceptkalender Veldrijden 2026
id:483529ce566f746ba730675316b6dee9.summary: De conceptkalender veldrijden voor het seizoen 2026-2027 is bekend. In het weekend van 26 september staat de eerste veldrit op het programma in Mechelen, de eerste cross voor de jeugd staat op de lijst voor 3 oktober in Norg.
id:483529ce566f746ba730675316b6dee9.ai_summary: The provisional cyclocross calendar for the 2026-2027 season has been announced. The first race is scheduled for the weekend of 26 September in Mechelen, while the first youth race is listed for 3 October in Norg.

id:2036e96c8bf53952d3066bd20ac303f2.title: Martinez na celkové pořadí na Tour nepojede. Přednost dává vrchařské soutěži, dokonce i před etapovým vítězstvím
id:2036e96c8bf53952d3066bd20ac303f2.summary: Loni sahal po celkovém vítězství ve vrchařské soutěži, ale nakonec se musel smířit s tím, že Tadeje Pogačara a Jonase Vingegaarda v současné podobě bodování jednoduše nemá. Lenny Martinez se vrací na start Tour de France s přáním vyhrát dres s červenými puntíky, na celkové pořadí si totiž nevěří.
id:2036e96c8bf53952d3066bd20ac303f2.ai_title: Martinez will not target the general classification at the Tour
id:2036e96c8bf53952d3066bd20ac303f2.ai_summary: Last year he came close to winning the mountains classification, but in the end he had to accept that Tadej Pogačar and Jonas Vingegaard are simply out of reach in the current points system. Lenny Martinez returns to the Tour de France aiming to win the polka dot jersey, as he does not believe he can contend for the overall classification.

id:3898812f645d8e50665a958fb20aba5d.title: Žádné strachy, jsem ve skvělé formě, tvrdí Seixas před premiérou na Tour de France
id:3898812f645d8e50665a958fb20aba5d.summary: Je nepochybně nejsledovanějším debutantem letošního ročníku Tour de France. Devatenáctiletý Paul Seixas by totiž měl ukončit více než čtyřicetileté čekání Francie na vítězství v celkovém pořadí největšího závodu světa. Po skvělé jarní sezóně se lídr týmu Decathlon CMA CGM řadil mezi tři největší favority, jenže pád a zranění na Tour Auvergne–Rhône-Alpes očekávání snížily. Sám Seixas však tvrdí, že není důvod se ničeho obávat, cítí se totiž skvěle.
id:3898812f645d8e50665a958fb20aba5d.ai_title: Seixas says he is in great shape ahead of Tour de France debut
id:3898812f645d8e50665a958fb20aba5d.ai_summary: He is likely the most closely watched debutant in this year's Tour de France. The 19-year-old Paul Seixas is expected to end France's more than 40-year wait for a home winner of the overall classification in the world's biggest race. After a strong spring, the Decathlon CMA CGM leader was among the three biggest favourites, but a crash and injury at Tour Auvergne–Rhône-Alpes lowered expectations. Seixas says there is no reason to worry, as he feels great.

id:f167d67dbe164798cf12aaaa2643f912.title: Maratona dles Dolomites zve na nejkrásnější průsmyky horské architektury. Vicenzo Nibali a Paolo Bettini doprovodí Jorge Martína, mistra světa MotoGP
id:f167d67dbe164798cf12aaaa2643f912.summary: Jestliže Dolomity jsou podle světoznámého vizionáře Le Corbusiera nejkrásnější architekturou planety, pak též jejich silniční cyklistické trasy patří mezi nejatraktivnější. Nebo alespoň vedou před nejkrásnějšími horskými kulisami. Přesvědčit se o tom můžete už tento víkend navzdory barcelonskému startu Tour osobně na už 39. Maratona dles Dolomites na severu Itálie, převážně v Jižním Tyrolsku.
id:f167d67dbe164798cf12aaaa2643f912.ai_title: Maratona dles Dolomites invites riders to the most beautiful mountain passes and architecture. Vincenzo Nibali and Paolo Bettini will accompany Jorge Martín, MotoGP world champion
id:f167d67dbe164798cf12aaaa2643f912.ai_summary: If the Dolomites are, according to the world-famous visionary Le Corbusier, the most beautiful architecture on the planet, then their road cycling routes are also among the most attractive. Or at least they lead through some of the most beautiful mountain scenery. You can see that for yourself this weekend, despite the Tour starting in Barcelona, at the 39th Maratona dles Dolomites in northern Italy, mainly in South Tyrol.

id:a2dfe5859450535c58770da7283f95f8.title: Negrente e il tricolore U23: un segno del destino, ora vuole di più

id:a2dfe5859450535c58770da7283f95f8.ai_summary: Negrente is enjoying his tricolore victory, a coveted jersey he had long been chasing. Now it is time to celebrate, but there are more goals ahead and thoughts about the future.

id:48cd85cc7ee0d5977a6530a49c0ce49e.ai_title: Chris Froome confirms his retirement from professional cycling: "Yes, I'm retiring"
id:48cd85cc7ee0d5977a6530a49c0ce49e.ai_summary: The British rider confirms he will not race again: "Unfortunately, there was that crash last summer. It wasn't how I wanted it to end, but even then I knew it was over."

id:ac3ff6a50fd1c0f2f316bc5a80f71ae7.summary: Torna SpazioTalk con l’episodio numero 189, eccezionalmente infrasettimanale, per parlare del Tour de France 2026. Dopo l’analisi dei favoriti nella scorsa puntata, ci soffermiamo oggi sullo studio delle 21 tappe che andranno a caratterizzare la Grande Boucle. Due cronometro, una a squadre e una individuale, tanta salita con i passaggi su Pirenei, Massiccio Centrale, Vosgi e Alpi. Lo spettacolo è assicurato, ma cogliamo l’occasione per provare a cerchiare in rosso alcuni dei punti chiave, quelli che potrebbero cambiare la storia della corsa. Sicuramente la doppia Alpe d’Huez nelle ultime tappe farà la differenza, ma ci sarà tanto terreno per attaccare. …
id:ac3ff6a50fd1c0f2f316bc5a80f71ae7.ai_title: SpazioTalk #189: the route of the Tour de France 2026
id:ac3ff6a50fd1c0f2f316bc5a80f71ae7.ai_summary: SpazioTalk returns with episode 189, an unusual midweek edition, to discuss the Tour de France 2026. After last episode’s analysis of the favourites, today we focus on the 21 stages that will shape the Grande Boucle. There are two time trials, one team and one individual, plus plenty of climbing through the Pyrenees, Massif Central, Vosges and Alps. The show promises plenty of action, and we highlight some key points that could decide the race, including the double Alpe d’Huez in the final stages.

id:432547574bd779f598504204654986bf.summary: Sarà un Tour de France 2026 speciale per la Lidl-Trek. La formazione tedesca celebrerà sulle strade della Grande Boucle e, a seguire, al Tour de France Femmes, i cinquant’anni di storia della casa produttrice di biciclette. Per l’occasione, la Trek ha preparato un telaio unico nel suo genere che ripercorre la storia dal 1976, anno di fondazione, con vari brand, colori e simboliche si sono succeduti negli anni. Una responsabilità, ma anche una motivazione per Mads Pedersen, …
id:432547574bd779f598504204654986bf.ai_title: Lidl-Trek to race a commemorative bike at the Tour de France 2026

The many colors will make the riders easy to spot in the bunch. The model will be called ICON 50. A responsibility, but also motivation for Mads Pedersen, ...

id:f9f8c0c8a5e8a9e460bf99031945bad9.title: Pourquoi les vélos vont-ils de plus en plus vite ?
id:f9f8c0c8a5e8a9e460bf99031945bad9.summary: En à peine cinq saisons, les moyennes des courses cyclistes ont explosé. Le matériel, optimisé dans chaque compartiment, y est pour beaucoup. Aéro, rigidité, légèreté, confort : les vélos n'ont jamais été aussi performants. Comme les athlètes qui les chevauchent. Ce combo homme-machine génère des vitesses folles.
id:f9f8c0c8a5e8a9e460bf99031945bad9.ai_title: Why are bikes getting faster and faster?
id:f9f8c0c8a5e8a9e460bf99031945bad9.ai_summary: In just five seasons, average speeds in cycling races have soared. Much of that is down to equipment, optimized in every area. Aerodynamics, stiffness, lightness, comfort: bikes have never been so efficient. Nor have the athletes riding them. This rider-machine combination is producing astonishing speeds.

id:19b25511ae90034ae5fdbcc9dc3d9a51.title: Tour de France - Décor de western, bière sans alcool et jusqu'à 8 000 calories par jour : en immersion au stage d'altitude de l'équipe TotalEnergies
id:19b25511ae90034ae5fdbcc9dc3d9a51.summary: Pour préparer le Tour de France, les présélectionnés participent au stage d'altitude en Sierra Nevada. id:19b25511ae90034ae5fdbcc9dc3d9a51.ai_title: Tour de France: Western-style setting, non-alcoholic beer and up to 8,000 calories a day inside TotalEnergies' altitude camp
id:19b25511ae90034ae5fdbcc9dc3d9a51.ai_summary: To prepare for the Tour de France, the preselected riders are taking part in an altitude camp in Sierra Nevada. id:c5639b8b341292fcf439174c2a2672ac.title: Čistý hattrick týmu ATT Investments na Solidarnosci završil po dalším skvělém leadoutu kdo jiný než Marceli Boguslawski!
id:c5639b8b341292fcf439174c2a2672ac.summary: Třetí etapa Course Cycliste de Solidarnosc et des Champions Olympiques (2.2) byla sice znovu rovinatá, ale tentokrát přibylo dramatičnosti. Na svědomí to měl větrný úsek, kde se startovní pole nadělilo. Vpředu se situace přeskupovala, vždy tam chyběl muž ve žlutém Marceli Boguslawski, ale nechyběli tam jeho spolujezdci v dostatečném počtu tak, aby nakonec na hromadný spurt došlo. Po dalším perfektně zvládnutém leadoutu završil týmovou práci potřetí v řadě opět Marceli Boguslawski.
id:c5639b8b341292fcf439174c2a2672ac.ai_title: ATT Investments complete a clean sweep at Solidarnosc as Marceli Boguslawski wins again
id:c5639b8b341292fcf439174c2a2672ac.ai_summary: The third stage of the Course Cycliste de Solidarnosc et des Champions Olympiques (2.2) was flat again, but the wind made it more selective and split the peloton. The front group kept changing, but yellow jersey Marceli Boguslawski was always missing until his teammates brought things back together for a bunch sprint. After another perfectly executed leadout, Marceli Boguslawski delivered the team’s third straight win.

id:725c62c05b3cc23ff7d02b40b41351cf.title: Oba chceme být na pódiu s Tadejem a Jonasem, říká Evenepoel o kolegovi Lipowitzovi a svých ambicích

Epis, 24 anni, entra infatti con effetto immediato nell’organico della Gallina Lucchini Ecotek Colosio. Formalizzato il cambio di colori, il bresciano sarà subito in azione con la nuova maglia, dato che farà parte della selezione della formazione di “casa” schierata al Giro delle Valli Aretine 2026, in programma domenica 5 luglio. Per Epis si tratta di un nuovo trasferimento per certi versi …

Giosuè Epis, 24, has left Petrolike and joined Italian Continental team Gallina Lucchini Ecotek Colosio with immediate effect. He will make his debut in the new colors at Giro delle Valli Aretine 2026 on Sunday, July 5.

id:50310c6b318bcece645207894f8c7266.title: Tour de France 2026, quanti punti UCI ci sono in palio? 1300 al vincitore, 210 per ogni successo di tappa
id:50310c6b318bcece645207894f8c7266.summary: Il Tour de France 2026 è la corsa più ricca del calendario anche per i punti a disposizione. Squadre e corridori, oltre che per il montepremi più importante della stagione, hanno anche un altro importante bottino su cui mettere le mani grazie alle loro performance. I risultati in strada, tra vittorie e piazzamenti, può infatti portare loro in dote una molto importante dote di punti UCI, preziosi per le varie classifiche mondiali stagionali. Un malloppo decisamente consistente quello che i corridori possono portarsi a casa, decisamente il più consistente dell’anno, superiore anche a quello degli altri GT stagionali, Giro d’Italia …
id:50310c6b318bcece645207894f8c7266.ai_title: Tour de France 2026: how many UCI points are on offer? 1300 for the winner, 210 for each stage win
id:50310c6b318bcece645207894f8c7266.ai_summary: The Tour de France 2026 is the richest race on the calendar in terms of points on offer. Teams and riders can also collect a major haul of UCI points through their results on the road, with wins and placings contributing to the season-long world rankings. It is the biggest points prize of the year, even larger than the other Grand Tours, including the Giro d’Italia.

Als je het niet hebt, heb je het niet.”
id:1c48861527550147df60c7c5c9de2065.ai_title: Interview. Lucien Van Impe, the last Belgian Tour de France winner 50 years ago: “Evenepoel? I give another Belgian a better chance to succeed me”

If you don't have it, you don't have it.”
