id:722819348ad69784dbb25faa171faedc.title: Videoreportáž: Masakr v Jeseníkách , mistrovský den s Fany Gastro Integray L27
id:722819348ad69784dbb25faa171faedc.summary: Extrémní teploty přes 40 stupňů, brutální tempo hned od startu a podmínky, ve kterých šlo doslova o přežití. Podívejte se na bezprostřední ohlasy jezdců a trenérů po cyklistickém mistrovství v Jeseníku, které se zapsalo do historie jako jeden z nejtěžších závodů vůbec. Jak se s peklem na trati vypořádali závodníci Fany Gastro? Kdo závod nedokončil kvůli časovému limitu a jaké jsou plány pro nadcházející mistrovství kategorie U23?
id:722819348ad69784dbb25faa171faedc.ai_title: Video report: Jeseníky massacre, championship day with Fany Gastro Integray L27
id:722819348ad69784dbb25faa171faedc.ai_summary: Temperatures above 40 degrees, brutal pace from the start, and conditions that made it a matter of survival. Watch the immediate reactions from riders and coaches after the cycling championships in Jeseník, which went down in history as one of the toughest races ever. How did the Fany Gastro riders handle the hellish course? Who failed to finish within the time limit, and what are the plans for the upcoming U23 championships?

id:86d7aec6e01b515928b728252edbe6c7.title: Za krásného počasí proběhl  v Plzni již 9. ročník stále více populární akce Fanatik – cyklistická výzva pro veřejnost
id:86d7aec6e01b515928b728252edbe6c7.summary: Tato nezávodní forma cyklistiky je nejen alternativou k závodům, ale našla si svoje příznivce napříč cyklistickou veřejností, od svátečních až po různé výkonnostní skupiny silničářů, bikerů, gravelistů, koloběžkářů i elektrokolařů.
id:86d7aec6e01b515928b728252edbe6c7.ai_title: The 9th edition of the increasingly popular Fanatik cycling challenge took place in Plzeň in fine weather
id:86d7aec6e01b515928b728252edbe6c7.ai_summary: This non-racing form of cycling is not only an alternative to competition, but has found fans across the cycling community, from casual riders to performance groups of road cyclists, mountain bikers, gravel riders, scooter riders and e-bike riders.

id:2bd48b522d3e4432bcee08c77f905cef.title: Podcast - Dočkáme se vyrovnanějšího souboje Pogačar vs. Vingegaard?
id:2bd48b522d3e4432bcee08c77f905cef.summary: Největší událost cyklistického kalendáře se definitivně blíží. Tour de France se startem v Barceloně slibuje další třítýdenní galapředstavení cyklistické smetánky. Jonas Vingegaard sní o zisku double Giro – Tour, ale v cestě mu stojí obhájce titulu a jednoznačně největší favorit závodu Tadej Pogačar. Slovinec je podle výkonů ze Švýcarska o stupeň lepší než ostatní jezdci v celkovém pořadí, ale 21 etap může do závodu vnést dramatické prvky, jako jsou vysoké teploty, nervozita, pády nebo odstoupení. Svou premiéru na scéně Grand Tour zažije vycházející domácí hvězda Paul Seixas. Forma tohoto francouzského mladíka bude poněkud nejistá, protože se v posledních týdnech zotavoval ze zranění způsobeného pádem na Tour Auvergne – Rhône-Alpes. Cyklistické léto s hlavním chodem sezóny může začít!
id:2bd48b522d3e4432bcee08c77f905cef.ai_title: Podcast - Will we see a more balanced battle between Pogačar and Vingegaard?
id:2bd48b522d3e4432bcee08c77f905cef.ai_summary: The biggest event on the cycling calendar is almost here. The Tour de France, starting in Barcelona, promises another three-week showcase for the sport's elite. Jonas Vingegaard is chasing the Giro-Tour double, but standing in his way is defending champion and clear race favorite Tadej Pogačar. Based on his performances in Switzerland, the Slovenian looks a step above the rest of the general classification contenders, but 21 stages could still bring drama through heat, nerves, crashes, or withdrawals. Rising home talent Paul Seixas will make his Grand Tour debut. His form is uncertain after recently recovering from injuries sustained in a crash at the Tour Auvergne – Rhône-Alpes. The cycling summer and its main course of the season can begin.

id:d5f65548b880c4ae7cbadf52eb19b052.title: Premium“Remco staat intern gewoon op één. Zo’n dominant figuur, helemaal anders dan Lipowitz”: ons sterrenpanel ziet dat deze Tour een kantelpunt kan worden voor EvenepoelWie hoopte dat ons sterrenpanel met een verrassende vijfsterrenfavoriet zou komen, is eraan voor de moeite. Toch schuwen onze panelleden ook nu de straffe uitspraken niet. Evenepoel staat voor een kantelpunt in zijn carrière, Seixas zit in de obsessiefase en bij BORA is er wél een uitgesproken kopman. “Evenepoel heeft al anderhalf jaar geen straffe wattages getrapt op een lange klim.”
id:d5f65548b880c4ae7cbadf52eb19b052.ai_title: Premium: “Remco is simply number one internally. Such a dominant figure, completely different from Lipowitz”: our star panel sees this Tour as a turning point for Evenepoel
id:d5f65548b880c4ae7cbadf52eb19b052.ai_summary: Anyone hoping our star panel would name a surprise five-star favorite will be disappointed. Even so, our panelists do not shy away from bold claims. Evenepoel faces a turning point in his career, Seixas is in the obsession phase, and BORA does have a clear leader. “Evenepoel has not produced strong wattages on a long climb for a year and a half.”

id:1491c798648d33f17e25c4304ab15b27.title: Favorieten rit 1 (Barcelona-Barcelona): geel pakken wordt aartsmoeilijke opdracht voor Remco Evenepoel
id:1491c798648d33f17e25c4304ab15b27.summary: Het format van de ploegentijdrit zorgt voor een interessant element, want voor de dagzege telt de tijd van de eerste renner van elke ploeg. Remco Evenepoel zal sowieso gebrand zijn op de gele trui, waarmee hij de 28ste renner in de geschiedenis zou worden die de leiderstruien van de drie grote rondes heeft gedragen. Maar dan moet hij wel voorbij Netcompany INEOS, dat volgepakt zit met tijdritspecialisten, ploeg-in-vorm UAE en Visma-Lease a Bike, dat altijd goed scoort in deze discipline.
id:1491c798648d33f17e25c4304ab15b27.ai_title: Stage 1 favorites (Barcelona-Barcelona): taking yellow will be a very tough task for Remco Evenepoel
id:1491c798648d33f17e25c4304ab15b27.ai_summary: The team time trial format adds an interesting twist, as the stage win will be decided by the time of the first rider from each team. Remco Evenepoel will certainly be eager for the yellow jersey, which would make him the 28th rider in history to have worn the leader’s jerseys in all three Grand Tours. But he will have to beat Netcompany INEOS, packed with time trial specialists, in-form UAE and Visma-Lease a Bike, which always performs well in this discipline.

id:af4225add9bb2f77ee7f3e183fcb1f96.title: Urska Zigart brengt daags voor Tourstart ode aan Tadej Pogacar in emotionele post: “Bedankt om ongegeneerd jezelf te zijn”
id:af4225add9bb2f77ee7f3e183fcb1f96.summary: Zelf herstelt ze nog volop van haar zware val in de Ronde van Zwitserland midden juni, maar daags voor de Tour houdt dat Urska Zigart niet tegen om haar verloofde Tadej Pogacar nog een hart onder de riem te steken. “Bedankt om ongegeneerd jezelf te zijn.”
id:af4225add9bb2f77ee7f3e183fcb1f96.ai_title: Urska Zigart pays emotional tribute to Tadej Pogacar the day before the Tour starts: “Thank you for being unapologetically yourself”
id:af4225add9bb2f77ee7f3e183fcb1f96.ai_summary: She is still recovering from her heavy crash in the Tour of Switzerland in mid-June, but the day before the Tour that does not stop Urska Zigart from giving her fiancé Tadej Pogacar some encouragement. “Thank you for being unapologetically yourself.”

id:bd452d30b796004d04c1f723f2bc9dea.title: RoadCast #10 – O mistráku v Jeseníku, Tour de France a proč může zazářit Mathias Vacek
id:bd452d30b796004d04c1f723f2bc9dea.summary: Mistrovství České a Slovenské republiky v Jeseníku je minulostí, Tour de France klepe na dveře. V desátém dílu podcastu RoadCast jsme proto zhodnotili domácí šampionát, rozebrali jednotlivé závody i výkony českých cyklistek a cyklistů a následně se zaměřili na největší závod sezóny. Nechybí naše pohledy na start v Barceloně, souboj Tadeje Pogačara s Jonasem Vingegaardem, šance Mathiase Vacka, Pavla Bittnera a Jakuba Otruby ani tipy na největší překvapení letošní Tour.
id:bd452d30b796004d04c1f723f2bc9dea.ai_title: RoadCast #10: The Czech and Slovak championships in Jeseník, the Tour de France, and why Mathias Vacek could shine
id:bd452d30b796004d04c1f723f2bc9dea.ai_summary: The Czech and Slovak championships in Jeseník are over, and the Tour de France is about to begin. In episode 10 of the RoadCast podcast, we review the national championships, break down the races and the performances of the Czech riders, and then focus on the biggest race of the season. We also discuss the start in Barcelona, the battle between Tadej Pogacar and Jonas Vingegaard, the chances of Mathias Vacek, Pavel Bittner, and Jakub Otruba, and our picks for the biggest surprise of this year's Tour.

id:cea35fd24ad910f5b279d9240502046d.title: Maryland Cycling Classic 2026, corsa annullata: gli organizzatori puntano a tornare nel 2027
id:cea35fd24ad910f5b279d9240502046d.summary: Il prossimo 6 settembre non si correrà la Maryland Cycling Classic 2026. Attraverso un comunicato, gli organizzatori della corsa statunitense hanno annunciato la cancellazione dell’evento, senza tuttavia specificare le motivazioni, anche se, come riportato da Cyclingnews, negli scorsi mesi erano emersi problemi legati ai finanziamenti. Creata nel 2020, ma subito rinviata al 2021 e, in seguito, al 2022 a causa dell’emergenza Covid-19, la corsa era già stata annullata anche nel 2024 a causa del crollo del ponte di Baltimora e fin qui ha quindi visto svolgersi tre edizioni al maschile (2022, 2023 e 2025) e una al femminile (2025), con …
id:cea35fd24ad910f5b279d9240502046d.ai_title: Maryland Cycling Classic 2026 cancelled, organizers aim to return in 2027
id:cea35fd24ad910f5b279d9240502046d.ai_summary: The Maryland Cycling Classic 2026 will not take place on September 6. In a statement, the organizers announced the cancellation of the US race but did not give a reason. Cyclingnews reported that funding problems had emerged in recent months. Created in 2020 and first postponed to 2021, then to 2022 because of the Covid-19 pandemic, the race was also cancelled in 2024 after the Baltimore bridge collapse. So far, it has held three men's editions (2022, 2023 and 2025) and one women's edition (2025).

id:747c05cf78031d7059cb0b8aef477005.title: Dove vedere il Tour de France 2026 in TV e Streaming? Ampio spazio sulla RAI, ma diretta integrale solo su Eurosport/Discovery+
id:747c05cf78031d7059cb0b8aef477005.summary: Andiamo a scoprire dove e quando seguire il Tour de France 2026 in TV e Streaming. La corsa più attesa dell’anno, che si svolgerà dal 4 al 26 luglio da Barcellona a Parigi, avrà ovviamente un’ampia copertura in diretta in Italia attraverso le due “tradizionali” soluzioni, Rai ed Eurosport, ma solamente una garantirà la trasmissione integrale dell’evento. Tutte le 21 tappe saranno infatti visibili dal primo all’ultimo chilometro solo sui canali e le piattaforme appartenenti al gruppo Warner Bros./Discovery, contrariamente alla TV di stato, che offrirà comunque un importante spazio alle tre settimane di gara che decideranno chi Orari TV …

id:747c05cf78031d7059cb0b8aef477005.ai_summary: Here is where and when to follow the Tour de France 2026 on TV and streaming. id:315cdafb84f454e79885b6e40cfa8392.title: Tour de France : dans la « marmite » du Tour, les rouages d'une pression mentale sans équivalent
id:315cdafb84f454e79885b6e40cfa8392.summary: À chaque édition, la pression inhérente au Tour de France est mentionnée, liée à son importance dans le calendrier, à la popularité de l'événement, à l'attente du public et à l'exigence des équipes en lice. Les coureurs affrontent un étau mental inévitable et sans commune mesure.
id:315cdafb84f454e79885b6e40cfa8392.ai_title: Tour de France: inside the Tour’s “cauldron”, the workings of unmatched mental pressure
id:315cdafb84f454e79885b6e40cfa8392.ai_summary: At every edition, the pressure inherent to the Tour de France is mentioned, linked to its place in the calendar, the event’s popularity, public expectations and the demands of the teams involved. Riders face an unavoidable mental squeeze unlike anything else.

id:64f6bfc90f68f3d7412364c33973a5b4.title: Porter le maillot jaune tout au long du Tour de France, un exploit que pourrait réaliser  Tadej Pogacar : « Il veut juste gagner toutes les courses du calendrier »
id:64f6bfc90f68f3d7412364c33973a5b4.summary: Jamais, depuis Jacques Anquetil en 1961, un coureur n'a régné en jaune de la première à la dernière étape du Tour de France. Mais le Slovène Tadej Pogacar ne semble pas s'intéresser à cette quête malgré son envie débordante de remporter toutes les courses.
id:64f6bfc90f68f3d7412364c33973a5b4.ai_title: Wearing the yellow jersey throughout the Tour de France, a feat Tadej Pogacar could achieve
id:64f6bfc90f68f3d7412364c33973a5b4.ai_summary: No rider has worn yellow from the first to the last stage of the Tour de France since Jacques Anquetil in 1961. But Slovenian Tadej Pogacar does not seem focused on that goal, despite his strong desire to win every race on the calendar.

id:7e235ec8bdcc67e85a3bec637689618b.title: Tour de France : pression populaire, nervosité du peloton, effort de trois semaines... Paul Seixas va devoir résoudre une équation à plusieurs inconnues
id:7e235ec8bdcc67e85a3bec637689618b.summary: Disputer un premier Grand Tour n'est jamais simple, encore plus sur le Tour de France. Paul Seixas va en découvrir toute la complexité dès samedi.

id:ebb95fb2bfb16f0ea45b6bf4e771a556.summary: À quelques mois de raccrocher le vélo, Ion Izagirre, 37 ans, professionnel depuis 2011 et double vainqueur d'étape sur la Grande Boucle, raconte l'évolution du cyclisme avant de disputer son dernier Tour de France, avec Cofidis.

id:75ca2d15b1e35fe05717938bb04544d7.title: Performances hors-norme, obsession de la victoire, santé mentale, les courses de Tadej Pogacar se jouent aussi dans la tête : « Il n'a jamais vraiment craqué mentalement »
id:75ca2d15b1e35fe05717938bb04544d7.summary: En masquant sa blessure à un genou l'an dernier au Tour de France, Tadej Pogacar avait accentué la pression autour de lui, admettant après coup avoir souffert mentalement. Mais sans jamais totalement plonger, selon ses proches.
id:75ca2d15b1e35fe05717938bb04544d7.ai_title: Tadej Pogacar’s races are decided in the mind too: big performances, winning obsession and mental health
id:75ca2d15b1e35fe05717938bb04544d7.ai_summary: By hiding his knee injury at last year’s Tour de France, Tadej Pogacar increased the pressure on himself and later admitted he struggled mentally. But according to those close to him, he never fully broke down.

Met een openingsploegentijdrit, twee aankomsten bovenop Alpe d’Huez en terug een Montmartre-slotrit is er spektakel alom. Discover the 21 stages that will take Remco Evenepoel, Tadej Pogacar and the other riders to Paris.

id:f33f1f07f2e9c2351b5c25f4e5ba989f.title: Remco Evenepoel: “Pogacar die ons op training voorbij vlamde? Maxim Van Gils heeft een beetje overdreven”

Vijf prangende vragen uit het ‘Book of Questions’ kunnen er dan ook nog wel bij. “Zonder Pogacar had ik nu twee Monumenten en één wereldtitel meer. De twijfel van de buitenwereld is dan weg.”

id:086730064a726b408ee5c776089f04c6.ai_summary: The Tour de France has not even started, but Picnic PostNL has already suffered a setback: veteran John Degenkolb crashed during a training ride on Friday. He will still start the opening stage, and the injuries appear to be minor.

id:cc074b723468a296bf52abef3dd6cc68.summary: Picnic PostNL beleeft op z'n zachts gezegd geen gelukkig seizoen. De ploeg van Iwan Spekenbrink won pas één keer dit jaar (Casper van Uden in de Ronde van Turkije) en bungelt hopeloos onderaan in de WorldTour. De laatste jaren wist de ploeg echter toch een sterke Tour de France op te leveren. Fran
id:cc074b723468a296bf52abef3dd6cc68.ai_title: Frank van den Broek remains confident Picnic PostNL can turn things around at the Tour
id:cc074b723468a296bf52abef3dd6cc68.ai_summary: Picnic PostNL is having a difficult season, with just one win so far this year and a place near the bottom of the WorldTour standings. But the team has still managed strong Tour de France performances in recent years, and Frank van den Broek says he believes they can do it again.

Dat de Nederlander van Caja Rural-Seguros RGA
id:4c27abb8b729cbd547232cfe1912730a.ai_title: Half-Spanish Alex Molenaar: “The polka dot jersey will be very important for my team in the coming days”
id:4c27abb8b729cbd547232cfe1912730a.ai_summary: Alex Molenaar will make his Tour de France debut on Saturday. It is a special moment for the Rotterdam-born rider, who turns 27 in just over a week. His mother is Spanish and her family comes from Barcelona and the surrounding area. The Caja Rural-Seguros RGA rider said the polka dot jersey could be important for his team in the coming days.

id:0dd14bf2eddd14895fe5e1d47f10190f.ai_title: Tour 2026: Lidl-Trek targets podium with Ayuso, clear role for Skjelmose
id:0dd14bf2eddd14895fe5e1d47f10190f.ai_summary: Juan Ayuso had the flu during the Tour Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, so his preparation for the Tour de France was not perfect. Even so, the Spaniard says he expects to improve as the race goes on. In Paris, the Lidl-Trek rider hopes to finish on the final podium.

id:6e8249bbfbc13e1c583370369e7ffbf1.ai_title: Huub Artz to wear Dutch colors for the first time in Tour de France team time trial: “Hard to believe”
id:6e8249bbfbc13e1c583370369e7ffbf1.ai_summary: Huub Artz surprised many by winning the Dutch time trial title a week and a half ago. For the 24-year-old from North Brabant, it is a dream come true.

id:07e24346f73938ccbe5a351fefe07d41.ai_title: Tour 2026: Red Bull and Evenepoel find their ‘best strategy’ for team time trial after many discussions
id:07e24346f73938ccbe5a351fefe07d41.ai_summary: What can Red Bull-BORA-hansgrohe do in the opening team time trial of the Tour de France? id:e779bf02135d7328e7c99af13a8eee41.ai_summary: Visma | Lease a Bike is among the contenders for victory in the team time trial on the opening day of the Tour de France. id:cc7d976ce82d67d198fdd4f74e11cbdf.summary: Heel veel kansen voor aanvallers liggen er niet in deze Tour de France 2026. id:cc7d976ce82d67d198fdd4f74e11cbdf.ai_summary: There are not many opportunities for attackers in this Tour de France 2026. But if you still need to fill your team with a few cheap riders, you can also think about adventurers. Wielerflits is happy to help, using Wielerflits Ploegleider, to point you toward a number of interesting attackers.

id:5c404d4832af151dbd863bb32b499e82.ai_title: Remco Evenepoel lost nearly four kilograms ahead of the Tour: “Everything was monitored”
id:5c404d4832af151dbd863bb32b499e82.ai_summary: Remco Evenepoel appears ready for the Tour de France after losing nearly four kilograms in the build-up to the race. He said so in an interview with Thijs Zonneveld for the In De Waaier podcast. Riders who lose a lot of weight can sometimes also lose power, but Evenepoel is not worried.

id:f2bbbd445fa8e2567a74181409360708.summary: De Tour de France moet nog beginnen, maar Picnic PostNL heeft al een eerste kleine tegenslag moeten verwerken: routinier Jonh Degenkolb is vrijdag tijdens een trainingsrit ten val gekomen. Degenkolb staat wel gewoon aan de start van de openingsetappe.De schade bij Degenkolb lijkt mee te vallen.

id:f2bbbd445fa8e2567a74181409360708.ai_summary: The Tour de France has not even started, but Picnic PostNL has already suffered a setback: veteran John Degenkolb crashed during a training ride on Friday. He will still start the opening stage, and the injuries appear to be minor.

id:f23c8ccfba3d9c2107d9178a7815fbe9.ai_title: Alpecin-Premier Tech to release behind-the-scenes Tour de France documentary
id:f23c8ccfba3d9c2107d9178a7815fbe9.ai_summary: Alpecin-Premier Tech will release a documentary ahead of the Tour de France that follows the team behind the scenes. Titled 'Expect the Unexpected', it will be available from Friday evening on the Belgian team's YouTube channel.

id:d910ef83ca267c138f66e8aa392d0373.ai_title: Maryland Cycling Classic will not take place in 2026
id:d910ef83ca267c138f66e8aa392d0373.ai_summary: The Maryland Cycling Classic will not be held in 2026, the organizers of the American 1.Pro race announced. No reason was given for the cancellation. The race was first held in 2022, when Belgian Sep Vanmarcke won.

id:e98b1631210f307a8b1c7dc1c93b355e.title: Kdo letos vyhraje zelený dres a kdo se stane nejlepším vrchařem 113. ročníku Tour de France?
id:e98b1631210f307a8b1c7dc1c93b355e.summary: Ve dvou bodovaných soutěžích Tour de France bychom letos měli sledovat souboje odlišných typů závodníků. Zatímco v bodovací soutěži to bude mezi nejrychlejšími sprintery a agresivními závodníky typu Madse Pedersena, ve vrchařské soutěži se budou uprchlíci snažit porazit nejlepší vrchaře mezi lídry na celkové pořadí.
id:e98b1631210f307a8b1c7dc1c93b355e.ai_title: Who will win the green jersey and who will be the best climber at the 113th Tour de France?
id:e98b1631210f307a8b1c7dc1c93b355e.ai_summary: In the two points competitions at this year's Tour de France, we should see battles between different types of riders. In the points classification, it will be between the fastest sprinters and aggressive riders such as Mads Pedersen, while in the mountains classification, breakaway riders will try to beat the best climbers among the overall contenders.

id:6f1ce8a092014351ed92dd8dd4ee855b.title: Villa dopo tanta sfortuna riabbraccia Milesi e Nicoletti

id:7a73c445221a3bd8bf8c8c962f2e1683.ai_title: Moser, Merckx and that wrong yellow jersey
id:7a73c445221a3bd8bf8c8c962f2e1683.ai_summary: At the 1975 Tour de France, the organizers were so sure the Cannibal would win that when they handed the Italian the yellow jersey, it had “Molteni” printed on it, the Belgian's team. They quickly prepared another one.

id:52a64f4bf2fb7fa607503680b94c8405.title: Giro d’Austria 2026, la startlist provvisoria
id:52a64f4bf2fb7fa607503680b94c8405.summary: 22 squadre al via del Giro d’Austria 2026. In programma dall’8 al 12 luglio, in contemporanea quindi con le tappe della prima settimana del Tour de France, la corsa di categoria UCI 2.1 conferma per quest’anno una partecipazione simile a quella della scorsa edizione, dominata da Isaac del Toro. Alla partenza si schiereranno sei formazioni WorldTour, ovvero Alpecin-Premier Tech, EF Education-EasyPost, Lidl-Trek, Netcompany Ineos, Team Jayco AlUla e UAE Team Emirates XRG, mentre non saranno presenti team Professional. Il resto del gruppo sarà dunque composto da compagini Continental, compresa l’italiana Mg.K Vis Costruzioni e Ambiente, cui si aggiunge la selezione …
id:52a64f4bf2fb7fa607503680b94c8405.ai_summary: 22 teams will take part in the Giro d’Austria 2026, held from 8 to 12 July alongside the first week of the Tour de France. The UCI 2.1 race features six WorldTour teams: Alpecin-Premier Tech, EF Education-EasyPost, Lidl-Trek, Netcompany Ineos, Team Jayco AlUla and UAE Team Emirates XRG. No Professional teams are listed, while the rest of the field is made up of Continental teams, including the Italian Mg.K Vis Costruzioni e Ambiente.

id:d16e3a94264016a5373c067ca87884e8.title: CicloMercato 2027, la Uno-X Mobility strappa alla Lidl-Trek il neo campione danese a crono Kristian Egholm
id:d16e3a94264016a5373c067ca87884e8.summary: La Uno-X Mobility continua a investire sui giovani corridori scandinavi. Secondo quanto riportato da Feltet, la formazione norvegese avrebbe infatti ormai chiuso l’accordo con Kristian Egholm, che la scorsa settimana si è laureato a sorpresa campione nazionale danese a cronometro battendo per questione di centesimi Mikkel Bjerg. Il 22enne, fratello minore dell’ex pro’ Jakob, milita da inizio 2024 nel vivaio della Lidl-Trek, ma per il suo passaggio tra i professionisti e nel WorldTour avrebbe quindi scelto la compagine diretta da Thor Hushovd, con la quale avrebbe firmato un contratto triennale a partire dal 1° gennaio 2027. Oltre al successo ai …
id:d16e3a94264016a5373c067ca87884e8.ai_title: CicloMercato 2027: Uno-X Mobility signs Danish time trial champion Kristian Egholm from Lidl-Trek
id:d16e3a94264016a5373c067ca87884e8.ai_summary: Uno-X Mobility continues to invest in young Scandinavian riders. According to Feltet, the Norwegian team has reached an agreement with Kristian Egholm, who last week surprisingly won the Danish national time trial title by a fraction of a second ahead of Mikkel Bjerg. The 22-year-old, younger brother of former pro Jakob, has been with the Lidl-Trek development team since early 2024 and is set to turn professional with a three-year contract at Thor Hushovd's team from 1 January 2027.

id:469db75df9590b0b3f8ee978c5252f9e.title: Al een aantal kopmannen op ruim één minuut van Vingegaard: dit is de stand der klassementsrenners in de Tour na de eerste ritJonas Vingegaard heeft de eerste veldslag in de Tour gewonnen. De Deen van Visma-Lease a Bike kwam als eerste van zijn ploeg over de streep, 7 seconden sneller dan Filippo Ganna (Netcompany INEOS). Vingegaard is de eerste leider in het algemene klassement en pakt meteen een bonus op zijn uitdagers voor de eindzege in de Tour.
id:469db75df9590b0b3f8ee978c5252f9e.ai_title: Several GC contenders already more than a minute behind Vingegaard after stage 1
id:469db75df9590b0b3f8ee978c5252f9e.ai_summary: Jonas Vingegaard won the first battle in the Tour. The Dane from Visma-Lease a Bike crossed the line first for his team, 7 seconds faster than Filippo Ganna (Netcompany INEOS). Vingegaard is the first overall leader and already gains time on his rivals for the Tour title.

id:0928e89a85b2c8ccb57a10f37ca5f2ca.title: “Geklopt door de beste ronderenners van onze generatie”: Remco Evenepoel tevreden met vijfde plaats in openingsrit Tour de France
id:0928e89a85b2c8ccb57a10f37ca5f2ca.summary: Remco Evenepoel zette de vijfde tijd neer in de openingsploegentijdrit in de Tour. De renner van Red Bull-BORA-hansgrohe blikt tevreden terug op zijn prestatie en kan vooruitkijken naar de volgende dagen. “De ploeg heeft het heel goed gedaan.”
id:0928e89a85b2c8ccb57a10f37ca5f2ca.ai_title: Remco Evenepoel pleased with fifth place in Tour de France opener
id:0928e89a85b2c8ccb57a10f37ca5f2ca.ai_summary: Remco Evenepoel set the fifth-fastest time in the opening team time trial at the Tour de France. The Red Bull-BORA-hansgrohe rider was satisfied with his performance and is looking ahead to the coming days. "The team did very well."

id:820646a5f4f3c7826d787ddd8eac2f57.title: Favorieten rit 2 (Tarragona - Barcelona): Pogacar of Van der Poel? Parcours laat er weinig twijfel over bestaan
id:820646a5f4f3c7826d787ddd8eac2f57.summary: In Barcelona wacht een explosieve finale met drie passages over de pittige Montjuïc en een oplopende aankomst naar het Olympisch Stadion. Een uitgelezen kans voor Tadej Pogacar om een gooi te doen naar de ritzege. Als de klassementsmannen oorlog maken, wordt deze finale allicht te zwaar voor een type als Mathieu van der Poel.
id:820646a5f4f3c7826d787ddd8eac2f57.ai_title: Favorites for stage 2 (Tarragona - Barcelona): Pogacar or Van der Poel? The route leaves little doubt
id:820646a5f4f3c7826d787ddd8eac2f57.ai_summary: In Barcelona, an explosive finale awaits with three passes over the tough Montjuïc and an uphill finish to the Olympic Stadium. It is a prime chance for Tadej Pogacar to go for the stage win. If the GC riders go to war, this finale will likely be too hard for a rider like Mathieu van der Poel.

id:495f2752a03e37f1146d7ae81eaf1522.title: VIDEO. De renners van Netcompany-INEOS werden gespot met beide armen in een badje met koud water, in tijdrithouding dus. En intussen volledig in focus op de taak voor handen in Barcelona, waar het om en bij de 30 graden was zaterdagavond. Vandaar de strategie, waarschijnlijk.

id:743ea86ed3e25a05554fa2d162042f45.ai_title: Tour 2026: Arnaud De Lie steps off during recon but warms up for team time trial

id:1dc37919045a9d1897379f4c1e41b476.title: Nejsem zklamaný, vlastně jsem moc spokojený, tvrdí Pogačar po třetím místě v týmové časovce
id:1dc37919045a9d1897379f4c1e41b476.summary: Tadej Pogačar má za sebou první zkoušku letošní Tour de France, kterou podle svých vlastních slov zvládl velmi dobře. Obhájce celkového vítězství ztratil na úvod Tour 12 sekund na Jonase Vingegaarda, ale nic si z toho nedělá. „Jsem strašně rád, že tenhle opravdu náročný den už je za mnou,“ říkal v cíli.
id:1dc37919045a9d1897379f4c1e41b476.ai_title: Pogačar satisfied after third place in the team time trial
id:1dc37919045a9d1897379f4c1e41b476.ai_summary: Tadej Pogačar said he was very happy with his first test at this year's Tour de France. The defending champion lost 12 seconds to Jonas Vingegaard on the opening day, but said he was simply glad to have such a tough day behind him.

id:2463cc2b8991657dd45855a76430d962.title: Perfektní start Tour de France, pochvaloval si Vingegaard po vítězství v časovce družstev. Tým Visma-Lease a Bike šetřil vrchaře až na závěr
id:2463cc2b8991657dd45855a76430d962.summary: Jonas Vingegaard se po téměř třech letech vrátil do vedení celkového pořadí Tour de France a byla to pro něj velmi emotivní chvíle. Závodníci týmu Visma-Lease a Bike dovezli svého lídra pod cílové stoupání a ten se jim odvděčil nejrychlejším časem v cíli i etapovým vítězstvím. Jezdci nizozemského celku měli obrovskou radost, ale Vingegaard upozorňuje, že tohle je teprve začátek Tour.
id:2463cc2b8991657dd45855a76430d962.ai_title: Vingegaard calls Tour de France start perfect after Visma-Lease a Bike team time trial win
id:2463cc2b8991657dd45855a76430d962.ai_summary: Jonas Vingegaard returned to the top of the general classification at the Tour de France after almost three years, in an emotional moment for him. Visma-Lease a Bike brought their leader to the final climb, where he rewarded the team with the fastest time and the stage win. The riders were delighted, but Vingegaard said the Tour has only just begun.

id:a4fd9c89f63920b6ecf0f805986b28d6.title: Vingegaard je ve žlutém! V úvodní časovce družstev exceloval tým Visma-Lease a Bike. Pogačar po první etapě Tour de France ztrácí 12 sekund
id:a4fd9c89f63920b6ecf0f805986b28d6.summary: Tým Visma-Lease a Bike zvítězil v úvodní časovce družstev Tour de France v Barceloně a prvním držitelem žlutého trikotu se stal Jonas Vingegaard. Druhý největší favorit celkového pořadí porazil tým Netcompany Ineos o 7 sekund a třetí UAE Emirates-XRG o 12 sekund. Stejný rozdíl je po první etapě mezi Vingegaardem a Tadejem Pogačarem.
id:a4fd9c89f63920b6ecf0f805986b28d6.ai_title: Vingegaard takes yellow as Visma-Lease a Bike wins opening team time trial
id:a4fd9c89f63920b6ecf0f805986b28d6.ai_summary: Visma-Lease a Bike won the opening team time trial of the Tour de France in Barcelona, and Jonas Vingegaard became the first rider to wear the yellow jersey. The second favorite for the overall title beat Netcompany Ineos by 7 seconds and UAE Emirates-XRG by 12 seconds. That same gap now separates Vingegaard and Tadej Pogačar after stage 1.

id:bb585fa6e1ebfd17a99a3d29e3c65204.title: Celkové prvenství Boguslawského, tři vítězné etapy, další dvě pódiová umístění a hromada UCI bodů - to jsou hlavní zisky ATT Investments ze Solidarnosci
id:bb585fa6e1ebfd17a99a3d29e3c65204.summary: Pětietapový Course Cycliste de Solidarnosc et des Champions Olympiques (2.2) je za námi. Tři etapy putovaly za Marcelem Boguslawskim, v dalších dvou etapách brali jezdci ATT Investments vždy po 2. místě a výsledkem je celkové prvenství polského sprintera. K tomu možno připočíst další dílčí úspěchy a hlavně 86 UCI bodů, abychom mohli konstatovat, že ze strany pardubického týmu to byl mimořádně vyvedený závod!
id:bb585fa6e1ebfd17a99a3d29e3c65204.ai_title: Boguslawski wins overall as ATT Investments take three stage victories and two more podiums at Solidarnosc
id:bb585fa6e1ebfd17a99a3d29e3c65204.ai_summary: The five-stage Course Cycliste de Solidarnosc et des Champions Olympiques (2.2) is over. Marcel Boguslawski won three stages, and ATT Investments riders finished second in the other two, giving the Polish sprinter the overall victory. Add in other strong results and, above all, 86 UCI points, and it was an outstanding race for the Pardubice team.

id:c548d9ab1f1c5f52f277471f5e4bd35a.title: Tour de France 2026, Presentazione Percorso e Favoriti Seconda Tappa: Tarragona
id:c548d9ab1f1c5f52f277471f5e4bd35a.summary: Dopo la cronosquadre d’apertura, il Tour de France 2026 vive la sua prima tappa in linea. Domenica 5 luglio si volge infatti la Tarragona-Barcellona, secondo e ultimo arrivo spagnolo di questa edizione della Grande Boucle. Al contrario di quanto avvenuto in passato, i velocisti dovranno attendere ancora prima di avere una possibilità concreta di provare a giocarsi il successo di tappa. Il circuito finale di Barcellona prevede infatti il duro strappo verso il castello di Montjuic, che rende la giornata adatta a uomini di classiche e cacciatori di tappe. Anche nella seconda tappa quindi i leader della classifica generale dovranno farsi trovare pronti, …
id:c548d9ab1f1c5f52f277471f5e4bd35a.ai_title: Tour de France 2026 route preview and stage 2 favorites: Tarragona
id:c548d9ab1f1c5f52f277471f5e4bd35a.ai_summary: After the opening team time trial, the Tour de France 2026 gets its first road stage. On Sunday 5 July, the Tarragona-Barcelona stage will be the second and final stage in Spain in this edition of the Tour. Unlike in the past, the sprinters will have to wait longer for a real chance at stage victory. The final circuit in Barcelona includes the tough climb to Montjuic Castle, making the stage suitable for Classics riders and stage hunters. The general classification leaders will also need to be ready on stage 2.

L’ultima volta che il danese indossò il simbolo del primato alla Grande Boucle fu a Parigi, nell’edizione da lui vinta nel 2023. Da quel momento un lungo inseguimento che si è concluso oggi, a Barcellona, al termine della cronosquadre inaugurale. Il Team Visma | Lease a Bike ha infatti vinto la prova, dominando sul percorso con una perfetta gestione tattica e il vincitore del Giro d’Italia ha già guadagnato 12 secondi sul rivale Tadej Pogačar. Si può dire che sia nulla, visto che …

Since then, a long chase that ended today in Barcelona, at the end of the opening team time trial. Team Visma | Lease a Bike won the stage, dominating the course with perfect tactical management, and the Giro d’Italia winner has already gained 12 seconds on rival Tadej Pogačar.
